title: France orders evacuation of tourist spot as hundreds flee wildfires by boat
english: French authorities have ordered a complete evacuation of the Cap Ferret peninsula as uncontrollable wildfires spread across the Gironde region. Thousands of residents and tourists are fleeing their homes and campsites by both land and boat to escape the danger. President Emmanuel Macron has requested emergency assistance from the European Union to help combat the intense blazes currently threatening the area.
amharic: የፈረንሳይ ባለስልጣናት በጊሮንድ ክልል እየተስፋፋ ባለው ከባድ የእሳት አደጋ ምክንያት የካፕ ፌሬት ባሕረ ገብ መሬትን ለቀው እንዲወጡ አዘዋል። በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ነዋሪዎች እና ቱሪስቶች በየብስ እና በጀልባዎች አካባቢውን እየለቀቁ ይገኛሉ። ፕሬዝዳንት ኢማኑኤል ማክሮን አካባቢውን እያሰጋ ያለውን እሳት ለመቆጣጠር ከአውሮፓ ህብረት የአስቸኳይ ጊዜ እርዳታ ጠይቀዋል።
oromo: Abbootiin taayitaa Faransaay bakka bashannanaa Kaap Fereet jedhamu keessatti ibidda hin to'atamne babal'achaa jiru irraa kan ka'e namoonni hundi akka gadi lakkisan ajajaniiru. Kumaatama kan lakkaa'aman jiraattotaa fi tuuristoonni balaa kana jalaa ba'uuf daandii qilleensaa fi markabaan naannichaa baqachaa jiru. Prezidaant Imaanu'el Maakroon ibiddi kun naannicha miidhuu isaa itti fufnaan, deeggarsa ariifataa biyyoota gamtooman Awurooppaa gaafataniiru.

title: Tech titan ordered to pay ex-wife $644m in divorce settlement
english: A South Korean court has ordered SK Group chairman Chey Tae-won to pay his ex-wife $644 million in a significant divorce settlement. The couple's 35-year marriage ended after the chairman had a child with another person. This ruling settles a long-standing legal battle over asset division involving the family-owned conglomerate.
amharic: የደቡብ ኮሪያ ፍርድ ቤት የኤስኬ ግሩፕ ሊቀመንበር ቼ ታኢ-ዎን ለቀድሞ ባለቤታቸው የ644 ሚሊዮን ዶላር የፍቺ ካሳ እንዲከፍሉ ወስኗል። የሁለቱ ወገኖች የ35 ዓመት የትዳር ሕይወት ሊቀመንበሩ ከሌላ ሴት ልጅ መውለዳቸው ከተጋለጠ በኋላ ያበቃል። ይህ ውሳኔ የሀገሪቱን ትልልቅ የንግድ ድርጅቶች የሚያንቀሳቅሰው ቤተሰብ የንብረት ክፍፍል ክርክርን የሚያጠናቅቅ ነው።
oromo: Mana murtii Kooriyaa Kibbaatti, dura ta'aan garee SK Group Chey Tae-won haadha manaa isaanii duraaniif qarshii miiliyoona 644 akka kaffalan ajajeera. Gaa'elli waggaa 35 turu kun erga dura ta'ichi dubartii biraa irraa ijoollee godhatanii booda kan diigame dha. Murtiin kun walitti bu'iinsa qabeenyaa gurguddaa maatii qabeenyaa guddaa kana keessatti uumame xumura itti godha.

title: US attacks Iran as Houthis allow Chinese ships to pass: What’s the latest?
english: For the thirteenth night in a row, the United States conducted military strikes against various Iranian infrastructure targets, including command centers and drone facilities, resulting in multiple casualties. Amid this escalation, shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has reached its lowest point in months. Notably, the Houthi rebels allowed two Chinese oil tankers to pass through the Bab al-Mandeb strait, despite their ongoing maritime blockade.
amharic: አሜሪካ ለተከታታይ አስራ ሶስት ቀናት በአይራን ወታደራዊ እና የጦር መሣሪያ ማከማቻ ጣቢያዎች ላይ የአየር ጥቃት የፈጸመች ሲሆን በደረሰው ጥቃትም የሰው ህይወት አልፏል። በዚህ የጦርነት ውጥረት መሃል በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት በኩል የሚደረገው የንግድ መርከቦች እንቅስቃሴ በወራት ውስጥ ዝቅተኛው ደረጃ ላይ ደርሷል። በሌላ በኩል፣ የሁቲ ታጣቂዎች በባብ አል-ማንደብ ስትሬት በኩል ሁለት የቻይና የነዳጅ መርከቦች እንዲያልፉ ፈቅደዋል።
oromo: Ameerikaan guyyaa kudha sadii walitti aanuuf buufataalee waraanaa fi iddoo meeshaa waraanaa Iraanirratti haleellaa kan gaggeessite yoo ta'u, haleellaa kanaanis lubbuun namootaa darbeera. Waraana kana keessatti, sochiin dooniiwwan bishaan harka (Strait of Hormuz) keessatti gaggeeffamu baatiiwwan darbanii oliin kan xiqqaa ta'e dha. Ta'us, gareen Huutii bishaan harka Baab al-Mandeb keessa dooniiwwan boba'aa Chaayinaa lama akka darban hayyamaniiru.

title: Real Madrid legend Ancelotti rivals Barcelona great Guardiola for Italy job
english: The Italian Football Federation is actively seeking a new head coach to lead their struggling national team after repeated failures to qualify for the World Cup. Technical director Paolo Maldini has confirmed that officials are in talks with high-profile managers Pep Guardiola and Carlo Ancelotti to fill the position. The federation aims to appoint a new leader soon as they look to rebuild the squad under new management.
amharic: የጣሊያን እግር ኳስ ፌዴሬሽን ለተከታታይ ጊዜያት ለዓለም ዋንጫ ማለፍ የተሳነውን ብሔራዊ ቡድን ለመምራት አዲስ ዋና አሰልጣኝ እየፈለገ ነው። የፌዴሬሽኑ ቴክኒካል ዳይሬክተር ፓኦሎ ማልዲኒ እንደገለጹት፣ አዲሱን አሰልጣኝ ለመሾም ከታዋቂዎቹ አሰልጣኞች ከፔፕ ጋርዲዮላ እና ከካርሎ አንቸሎቲ ጋር ድርድር እየተካሄደ ነው። ፌዴሬሽኑ ቡድኑን እንደገና ለማደራጀት አዲሱን አሰልጣኝ በቅርቡ ይፋ ለማድረግ አቅዷል።
oromo: Federeeshiniin kubbaa miilaa Xaaliyaanii garee biyyaalessaa isaanii kan tapha waancaa addunyaaf darbuu dadhabe bakka buusuuf, leenjisaa haaraa barbaadaa jiru. Daayrektarri teeknikaa Paooloo Maaldiinii akka ibsanitti, federeeshiniin sun leenjisaa beekamaa kan ta'an Pep Guardiola fi Carlo Ancelotti waliin marii irratti argamu. Federeeshiniin kun garee isaanii deebisanii ijaaruuf leenjisaa haaraa kana dhiyeenyatti beeksisuuf karoorfateera.

title: Indian activist Wangchuk ends 26-day hunger strike
english: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk has concluded his 26-day hunger strike following government assurances. He initiated the protest to demand accountability for recent leaks in medical entrance examinations. Prime Minister Narendra Modi responded to the situation by promising the establishment of special fast-track courts to penalize those responsible for the irregularities.
amharic: የህንድ አክቲቪስት ሶናም ዋንግቹክ በህክምና መግቢያ ፈተናዎች ላይ የተከሰተውን የፈተና መስረቅ በመቃወም ለ26 ቀናት ሲያካሂዱት የነበረውን የረሃብ አድማ አቁመዋል። ይህ ውሳኔ የመጣው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ናሬንድራ ሞዲ ለፈተናው መፍሰስ ተጠያቂ የሆኑ አካላትን በልዩ ፍርድ ቤት በፍጥነት ለፍርድ እንደሚያቀርቡ ቃል ከገቡ በኋላ ነው። አክቲቪስቱ በድርጊቱ የተሳተፉ ወገኖች ተገቢውን ቅጣት እንዲያገኙ ሲወተውቱ ቆይተዋል።
oromo: Duula beelaa guyyaa 26f gaggeessaa turan booda, qabsaa'aan biyya Indiyaa Sonam Waangchuuk gaaffii isaanii mootummaan deebisuun booda duulicha dhaabaniiru. Qabsaa'aan kun qormaata seensa kolleejjii fayyaa keessatti hanqinaalee fi hattoota qormaataa mul'atan mormuun sagalee dhageessisaa turan. Muummichi ministeeraa Narendiraa Moodii yakka kana raawwataniif tarkaanfii hatattamaa fudhachuuf mana murtii addaa hundeessuuf waadaa seenuun isaanii duulichi akka dhaabatu godheera.

title: Tehran slams Trump’s threat to use frozen Iranian assets as ‘incendiary’
english: President Trump recently announced plans to use frozen Iranian financial assets to cover damages caused by conflicts in the Strait of Hormuz. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi strongly criticized this move, describing it as an inflammatory and dangerous precedent that threatens global asset security. This escalation follows an increase in military hostilities, with the U.S. conducting frequent airstrikes while Iran retaliates with drone attacks on American bases in the region.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ በሆርሙዝ የባህር በር ለደረሱ ጉዳቶች ካሳ ለመክፈል በዩናይትድ ስቴትስ ቁጥጥር ስር ያለውን የኢራን የቀዘቀዘ ንብረት እንደሚጠቀሙ አስታውቀዋል። የኢራን የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር አባስ አራግቺ ይህንን እርምጃ አደገኛ እና የዓለምን የንብረት ደህንነት አደጋ ላይ የሚጥል ነው ሲሉ ኮንነዋል። ይህ የቃላት ልውውጥ እየተካሄደ ያለው በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ወታደራዊ ግጭት እየተባባሰ በሄደበት ወቅት ነው።
oromo: Pireezidaanti Traamp miidhaa galaana Hormuz irratti ga'eaf kaffaluuf qabeenya Iiraan kan Ameerikaan to'attuufi qabdu fayyadamuuf akka karoorsan beeksisaniiru. Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Iiraan Abbaas Araagchii tarkaanfichi kan nama gubeefi seenaa hamaa kan uumuudha jechuun balaaleeffataniiru. Walitti bu'iinsi kun kan dhufe waraanni Ameerikaafi Iiraan gidduu jiru hammaachaa dhufuu isaatiin wal-qabatee dha.

title: ‘Collapsed’: Roadblocks, internet blackout leave Pakistani Kashmir in limbo
english: Pakistan-administered Kashmir is currently facing a severe crisis due to ongoing protests, road blockades, and a prolonged internet blackout. These disruptions have caused significant hardship for residents, making it nearly impossible to access essential medical care or transport emergency patients. The unrest was sparked by the government's crackdown on a group demanding political reforms and the removal of certain reserved legislative seats.
amharic: በፓኪስታን ቁጥጥር ስር ባለው ካሽሚር እየተካሄደ ያለው ተቃውሞ፣ የመንገድ መዘጋት እና የኢንተርኔት መቋረጥ ለነዋሪዎች ከባድ ችግር ፈጥሯል። እነዚህ ችግሮች የህክምና አገልግሎት ማግኘት እንዳይቻል በማድረጋቸው የታካሚዎችን ህይወት ለአደጋ አጋልጧል። ውጥረት የተፈጠረው መንግስት የፖለቲካ ማሻሻያዎችን የሚጠይቀውን ቡድን በመከልከሉ እና የሰላማዊ ሰልፍ አድማዎችን በመውሰዱ ነው።
oromo: Kaashmiir godina Paakistaaniin bulchitu keessatti mormiin, daandiiwwan cufamuu fi intarneetii dhaabachuun namoota irratti miidhaa guddaa geessisee jira. Rakkoon kun tajaajila fayyaa argachuu fi namoota dhukkubsatan gara hospitaalaatti geessuu dhorkee jira. Tarii kanneen uumaman kun mootummaan garee jijjiirama siyaasaa gaafachaa turan irratti tarkaanfii waan fudhateef kan jalqabe dha.

title: Sirens sound in Bahrain
english: Authorities in Bahrain have activated emergency sirens across the country due to the threat of potential attacks from Iran. The Ministry of Interior has advised all residents and citizens to stay composed and seek immediate shelter in the closest safe locations. Officials are actively monitoring the situation to ensure public safety.
amharic: የባህሬን የውስጥ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር ከኢራን ሊሰነዘሩ የሚችሉ ጥቃቶችን በመስጋት በመላ ሀገሪቱ የአደጋ ማስጠንቀቂያ ደወሎችን አሰምቷል። መንግስት ዜጎችና ነዋሪዎች መረጋጋታቸውን ጠብቀው በአቅራቢያቸው ወደሚገኝ አስተማማኝ ቦታ እንዲጠለሉ መመሪያ ሰጥቷል። ባለሥልጣናቱ የህዝብን ደህንነት ለመጠበቅ ሁኔታውን በቅርበት እየተከታተሉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Mootummaan Bahraini weerara Iran irraa dhufuu danda'u sodaachuudhaan, biyyattii keessatti sagalee akeekkachiisaa gadi dhiiseera. Ministeerri Dhimma Keessaa lammiileen fi jiraattonni tasgabbii akka qabaatan fi bakka nageenya qabu dhihoo juttiitti akka baqatan gorseera. Aangoonni mootummaa nageenya ummataa eeguuf haala jiru hordofaa jiru.

title: Flights resumed at Erbil International Airport following suspension due to drone attacks
english: Flight operations have officially restarted at Erbil International Airport after a brief closure. The airport had suspended all air traffic earlier today because a drone crashed nearby. Security officials confirmed the incident, but normal service has since been restored.
amharic: በኢራቅ የሚገኘው የኤርቢል ዓለም አቀፍ አውሮፕላን ማረፊያ ለጊዜው ከተቋረጠ በኋላ በረራዎችን እንደገና ጀምሯል። የዛሬው እገዳ የተከሰተው በአውሮፕላን ማረፊያው አቅራቢያ በደረሰ የድሮን ጥቃት ምክንያት ነበር። የጸጥታ አካላት ጉዳዩን ያረጋገጡ ሲሆን አሁን ግን የበረራ አገልግሎቱ ወደ ቀድሞ ሁኔታው ተመልሷል።
oromo: Buufanni xiyyaaraa idil-addunyaa Erbil erga yeroo gabaabaaf cufamee booda hojii isaa itti fufeera. Yeroon kun kan uumame erga buufaticha biratti xiyyaaronni bishaani (drone) kufee booda ture. Qaamni nageenyaa oduu kana kan mirkaneesse yoo ta'u, amma garuu deddeebiin xiyyaaraa gara hojii idileetti deebi'eera.

title: Israeli attack wounds two paramedics in south Lebanon
english: Two paramedics were injured after an Israeli strike targeted an ambulance in the southern Lebanese town of Nabatieh al-Fawqa. Lebanon's health ministry condemned the incident, labeling it a direct assault on medical personnel. Officials further stated that this action serves as a clear breach of international humanitarian regulations.
amharic: በደቡብ ሊባኖስ ናባቲዬ አል-ፋውቃ በተባለች ከተማ የእስራኤል ጥቃት በአምቡላንስ ላይ በመፈጸሙ ሁለት የድንገተኛ ህክምና ባለሙያዎች ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። የሊባኖስ የጤና ሚኒስቴር ይህንን ድርጊት በህክምና ሰራተኞች ላይ ያነጣጠረ ጥቃት በማለት አውግዞታል። ባለስልጣናቱ አክለውም ድርጊቱ አለም አቀፍ የሰብአዊ መብት ህጎችን የጣሰ ግልጽ ጥሰት መሆኑን አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Magalaa Nabatiye al-Fawqa kan kibba Libaanositti, haleellaa Israa'el ambulaansii tokko irratti raawwatteen ogeeyyonni fayyaa lama miidhamaniiru. Ministeerri fayyaa Libaanos haleellaa kana balaaleffachuun, tarkaanfichi ogeeyyota fayyaa irratti kan xiyyeeffate ta'uu ibseera. Hojjettoonni mootummaa kun itti dabaluun, gochi kun seera idil-addunyaa kan mirga namoomaa fi kanneen biroo kan cabsu ta'uu beeksisaniiru.

title: Four Palestinians killed in settler attack
english: At least four Palestinians were killed following a shooting attack by settlers in the West Bank town of Tell. In addition to the fatalities, several other individuals sustained injuries, with three victims reported to be in critical condition. Local sources confirmed that live ammunition was used during the incident.
amharic: በምዕራብ ባንክ በቴል ከተማ በተፈጠረ የግጭት አጋጣሚ ቢያንስ አራት ፍልስጤማውያን በአሰፋሪዎች በተተኮሰ ጥይት ሕይወታቸው አልፏል። ከሟቾቹ በተጨማሪ ሌሎች በርካታ ሰዎች ጉዳት የደረሰባቸው ሲሆን፣ ከነዚህ ውስጥ የሦስቱ ሁኔታ አደገኛ እንደሆነ ተገልጿል። ጥቃቱ የተፈጸመው በቀጥታ ጥይት በመተኮስ መሆኑን የአካባቢው ምንጮች አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Godina Lixaa Baankii magaalaa Tell keessatti namoonni Falasxiin afur haleellaa qawwee qaxxaamuraan gandaan isaan irratti banameen lubbuun isaanii darbeera. Miidhaan kun du'a booda namoota biroo irrattis gahee jira, isaan keessaas namoonni sadii haala hamaa keessa akka jiran himameera. Gabaasni naannichaa akka ibsetti, haleellaan kun dhukaasa qawwee fayyadamuun kan raawwatame dha.

title: Pride with a dash of prejudice: How the Spectator succumbed to the narrative of anti-Muslim bigotry
english: A new report from the Centre for Media Monitoring reveals that The Spectator magazine has published a significant amount of biased content against Muslims over the past several years. By analyzing thousands of articles, researchers found that the publication frequently portrays Islamic influence negatively and frames prejudice as legitimate political debate. Critics and former staff suggest that the magazine has actively promoted divisive ideologies, effectively normalizing racism under the guise of high-quality journalism.
amharic: የመገናኛ ብዙሃን ክትትል ማዕከል ባወጣው አዲስ ሪፖርት መሠረት፣ ዘ ስፔክቴተር መጽሔት ባለፉት ጥቂት ዓመታት ውስጥ ሙስሊሞችን የሚጎዳ አድሎአዊ ይዘት ያላቸውን በርካታ ጽሁፎች አሳትሟል። ተመራማሪዎች በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ጽሁፎችን ከመረመሩ በኋላ፣ መጽሔቱ ስለ እስልምና አሉታዊ አመለካከቶችን እንደሚያሰራጭ እና ጥላቻን እንደ ህጋዊ የፖለቲካ ክርክር እንደሚያቀርብ አረጋግጠዋል። ተቺዎች እና የቀድሞ የመጽሔቱ ሰራተኞች፣ መጽሔቱ ዘረኝነትን እንደ ጥራት ያለው ጋዜጠኝነት በማስመሰል አደገኛ አስተሳሰቦችን እንደሚያበረታታ ይናገራሉ።
oromo: Gabaasni haaraan kan 'Centre for Media Monitoring' baase akka agarsiisutti, magaaziniin 'The Spectator' waggoota darban keessa miidiyaa muslimoota irratti loogii qabu babal'isaa ture. Qorattoonni barruulee kumaatama keessa darbuudhaan, magaaziniin kun amantii Islaamaa haala madaallii hin qabneen ibsuu fi jibbiinsa akka yaada siyaasaa idileetti dhiyeessu argataniiru. Qeeqonni fi hojjettootni magaazinii kanaan dura turan, magaaziniin kun jibbiinsa sanyummaa akka gosa gaazixeessummaa qulqulluutti dhiyeessuun yaada garaa garummaa uumuu fi jibbiinsa babal'isaa jira jedhu.

title: Ukraine beheads its military as its performance begins to soar
english: Ukraine has recently replaced its top military and defense leaders, including the Defense Minister and the Commander-in-Chief, despite the country's armed forces currently achieving significant successes against Russia. While Ukrainian forces are inflicting heavy losses on Russian troops and stalling their territorial gains, the government chose to reshuffle its leadership amid ongoing strategic disagreements. This simultaneous change in command marks an unprecedented move in the ongoing conflict, occurring even as Russia's own military and economic performance faces serious struggles.
amharic: ዩክሬን የጦር ኃይሏ በሩሲያ ላይ ከፍተኛ ስኬት እያስመዘገበ ባለበት ወቅት፣ ከፍተኛ የመከላከያ እና የወታደራዊ አመራሮቿን በድንገት ለውጣለች። የዩክሬን ጦር በሩሲያ ላይ ከባድ ኪሳራ በማድረስ እና ግዛቶቻቸውን በማስጠበቅ ረገድ ውጤታማ ቢሆንም፣ በመንግስት ውስጥ በተፈጠረ የስልት አለመግባባት ምክንያት የመከላከያ ሚኒስትሩን እና የጦር አዛዡን ጨምሮ በርካታ ባለስልጣናት ተነስተዋል። ይህ በአንድ ጊዜ የተደረገ የአመራር ለውጥ በጦርነቱ ታሪክ ያልታየ ሲሆን፣ በሌላ በኩል ሩሲያ በወታደራዊ እና በኢኮኖሚ ዘርፎች ከፍተኛ ፈተና ውስጥ መሆኗን ያሳያል።
oromo: ዩክሬን ጦርነቱ በሩሲያ ላይ ከፍተኛ መሻሻል እያሳየ ባለበት ወቅት፣ የመከላከያ ሚኒስትሯንና የጦር አዛዡን ጨምሮ ከፍተኛ ወታደራዊ አመራሮቿን በድንገት ቀይራለች። የዩክሬን ጦር በሩሲያ ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት እያደረሰ እና ግዛቶቹን እየጠበቀ ቢሆንም፣ በመንግስት ውስጥ በተፈጠረ የስትራቴጂክ ልዩነት ምክንያት ይህ ለውጥ ሊደረግ ችሏል። ይህ በአንድ ጊዜ የተደረገ የአመራር ለውጥ በጦርነቱ ታሪክ ውስጥ ያልታየ ሲሆን፣ በሩሲያ በኩል እየታየ ካለው የወታደራዊ እና የኢኮኖሚ ውድቀት ጋር ተያይዞ ትኩረት ስቧል።

title: Trillion dollar US defence bill would deepen military ties with Israel
english: The US House of Representatives has approved a massive $1.15 trillion defense budget that strengthens military collaboration with Israel. This legislation focuses on developing joint technologies, including artificial intelligence, drone systems, and missile defense shields. While proponents support the alliance, critics are concerned that this increased support could worsen regional political tensions.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የተወካዮች ምክር ቤት ከእስራኤል ጋር ያለውን ወታደራዊ ትብብር የሚያጠናክር 1.15 ትሪሊዮን ዶላር የሚጠጋ የመከላከያ በጀት አፅድቋል። ይህ ህግ በሰው ሰራሽ አስተውሎት፣ በድሮን ቴክኖሎጂ እና በሌሎች የሚሳኤል መከላከያ ስልቶች ላይ በጋራ ለመስራት ያተኩራል። ይሁን እንጂ አንዳንድ ተቺዎች ይህ ድጋፍ በአካባቢው ያለውን የፖለቲካ ውጥረት ሊያባብሰው እንደሚችል ስጋታቸውን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Mana maree bakka bu'oota ummataa Ameerikaa baajata ittisa biyyaa kan tiriliyoona 1.15 ta'u kan Israa'el wajjin qaban guddina waraanaa cimsu mirkaneessaniiru. Seerichi teeknoloojiiwwan ammayyaa kanneen akka arifishal intelejensii, diroonii fi gahuu ittisa misayilii irratti walta'iinsaan hojjechuuf kan karoorfatedha. Ta'us, gariin mormitootaa gargaarsichi naannichatti walitti bu'iinsa siyaasaa akka hammeessu yaaddoo qaban ibsaniiru.

title: Israel carries out blasts across south Lebanon despite ‘ceasefire’ deal
english: Despite ongoing peace talks and a brokered ceasefire, Israeli forces have launched new attacks and explosions in southern Lebanon. These operations include the destruction of homes and infrastructure, which critics argue is part of an effort to create a buffer zone. While international leaders continue to discuss a framework for withdrawal and stability, local residents continue to face regular military strikes and the loss of entire villages.
amharic: ቀጣይነት ያለው የሰላም ድርድር እና የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት ቢኖርም፣ የእስራኤል ኃይሎች በደቡባዊ ሊባኖስ አዳዲስ ጥቃቶችን እና ፍንዳታዎችን አድርሰዋል። እነዚህ ድርጊቶች የመኖሪያ ቤቶችን እና መሰረተ ልማቶችን ማውደምን የሚያካትቱ ሲሆን፣ ተቺዎች ይህ አካሄድ የደህንነት ቀጠና ለመፍጠር የሚደረግ ጥረት እንደሆነ ይገልጻሉ። የዓለም መሪዎች ለሰላም እና ለወታደሮች መውጣት በድርድር ላይ ቢሆኑም፣ የአካባቢው ነዋሪዎች ግን አሁንም በየጊዜው በሚደርስባቸው ጥቃት እና መንደሮቻቸው በመፈራረስ ላይ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Haa ta'u malee, mariin nagaa fi waliigalteen dhaabbii waraanaa jiraatus, humnoonni Israa'el kibba Libnaan keessatti haleellaa fi dhohiinsa haaraa raawwataniiru. Gochonnii kun mana jireenyaa fi bu'uraalee misoomaa barbadeessuu kan dabalatu yoo ta'u, qeeqonni immoo tarkaanfichi naannoo nageenyaa uumuuf kan yaadame akka ta'e dubbatu. Hoggantoonni addunyaa nageenyaa fi baay'ina waraanaa irratti mari'achaa jiranis, jiraattoonni naannichaa guyyuu haleellaa waraanaa fi barbadaa'uu ganda isaanii jalaa baachaa jiru.

title: Albanian police use water cannon on protesters over Kushner-linked resort
english: Albanian police used water cannons and pepper spray to disperse protesters gathered outside the parliament building. The demonstrators are calling for Prime Minister Edi Rama to step down amid ongoing unrest. The protests were triggered by public opposition to a controversial luxury resort project involving Jared Kushner.
amharic: የአልባኒያ ፖሊስ ከፓርላማው ህንፃ ውጭ የተሰበሰቡ ተቃዋሚዎችን ለመበተን የውሃ መድፍ እና የቃሪያ መርጨት ተጠቅሟል። ሰልፈኞቹ በሀገሪቱ እየተካሄደ ባለው ተቃውሞ የጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ኤዲ ራማን ስልጣን መልቀቅ እየጠየቁ ይገኛሉ። ተቃውሞው የተቀሰቀሰው ከጃሬድ ኩሽነር ጋር ግንኙነት አለው በተባለ የቅንጦት መዝናኛ ፕሮጀክት ላይ ባለው ተቃውሞ ምክንያት ነው።
oromo: Poolisiin Albaniyaa mormitoota mana maree biyyaa fuulduratti walgahanii turan bittinneessuuf bishaan dhiibbaa ol'aanaa qabuufi facaasaa ija miidhu fayyadamaniiru. Mormitoonni kun mormii torban torbaaf itti fufee jiruun walqabatee Mummicha Ministeeraa Eedii Raamaa aangoorraa akka gadhiisan gaafachaa jiru. Mormiin kun kan ka'e, pirojektii mana boqonnaa qananii kan jireenya Jared Kushner waliin walqabatu mormuufi.

title: Morning update
english: Tensions between the U.S. and Iran have escalated, with U.S. strikes killing four people and Iran retaliating by using drones to target military infrastructure in Jordan and Bahrain. Meanwhile, the Pentagon revised its death toll for U.S. troops down to 14, excluding casualties that occurred after a previous ceasefire. Additionally, ongoing violence in Gaza and the West Bank resulted in the deaths of five Palestinians.
amharic: በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ያለው ውጥረት ተባብሶ የቀጠለ ሲሆን፣ የአሜሪካ የአየር ጥቃት አራት ሰዎችን ሲገድል ኢራን በምላሹ በዮርዳኖስ እና በባህሬን በሚገኙ ወታደራዊ መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ በድሮን ጥቃት አድርሳለች። የፔንታጎን ቀደም ሲል የነበረውን የተጎጂዎች ቁጥር በማሻሻል 14 የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መሞታቸውን አስታውቋል። በሌላ በኩል በጋዛ እና በዌስት ባንክ በተፈጸሙ ጥቃቶች አምስት ፍልስጤማውያን ሕይወታቸው አልፏል።
oromo: Walitti bu'iinsi Ameerikaa fi Iraan gidduu jiru daran hammaachaa kan dhufe yoo ta'u, haleellaa xiyyaaraa Ameerikaan gaggeessiteen namoonni afur du'aniiru. Iraanis haaloo ba'uuf jecha buufataalee waraanaa Yordaanosii fi Baahireen keessatti argaman irratti haleellaa xiyyaara maleeyyinii (drone) gaggeessiteetti. Pentalgoon lakkoofsa loltoota isaa du'anii 14tti gadi hir'isuun ibseera. Kana malees, weerara naannoo Gaazaa fi West Baankiitti gaggeeffameen namoonni shan du'aniiru.

title: Iran launches attacks on US army facilities in Bahrain, Jordan
english: On Friday morning, Iran carried out drone strikes against United States military installations located in Jordan and Bahrain. The attacks hit strategic locations including troop barracks, storage facilities, and fuel depots at two specific air bases. These strikes mark a significant escalation in regional tensions involving U.S. infrastructure in the Middle East.
amharic: የኢራን ጦር አርብ ማለዳ በዮርዳኖስ እና በባህሬን በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ካምፖች ላይ በድሮን ጥቃት አድርሷል። ጥቃቱ በሁለቱ የአየር ማረፊያዎች ውስጥ የሚገኙ የነዳጅ ማጠራቀሚያዎችን፣ የጦር መሳሪያ ማከማቻዎችን እና የወታደራዊ መኖሪያ ቤቶችን ኢላማ አድርጓል። ይህ ድርጊት በመካከለኛው ምስራቅ በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ ያነጣጠረ ውጥረት መባባሱን ያሳያል።
oromo: Ganama Jimaata, waraanni Iraan buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa kanneen Yordaanos fi Bahireen keessatti argaman irratti weerara doonii (drone) gaggeessuu isaa beeksiseera. Weerarichi buufataalee xiyyaaraa kana lamaan keessatti iddoowwan kuusaa boba'aa, meeshaalee waraanaa fi mana jireenyaa loltootaa irratti xiyyeeffate. Gochi kun naannoo Baha Giddu galeessatti bu'uuraalee misooma waraana Ameerikaa irratti walitti bu'iinsi dabaluu isaa kan mul'isuudha.

title: Malaysia envoy summoned by US over Israel stance
english: The United States government recently called in the Malaysian ambassador to clarify the nation's firm stance against recognizing Israel. Malaysian officials reaffirmed that their immigration laws prohibit entry to Israeli nationals and noted that they have recently deported individuals found to be holding dual citizenship. This diplomatic tension follows an ongoing investigation into allegations that Israeli citizens used foreign passports to enter Malaysia for specific projects.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መንግሥት እስራኤልን ላለመቀበል የወሰደውን አቋም ለማብራራት የባለስልጣናት ማሌዥያን አምባሳደር ጠርቷል። የማሌዥያ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር አገሪቱ እስራኤላውያን ወደ አገሪቱ እንዳይገቡ የሚከለክል የቆየ ፖሊሲ እንዳላት አስታውቋል። ይህ ውዝግብ የተፈጠረው አንዳንድ እስራኤላውያን በሌላ አገር ፓስፖርት በመጠቀም ማሌዥያ መግባታቸው ከተጠረጠረ በኋላ ነው።
oromo: Mootummaan Ameerikaa ambaasaaddara Maleezhiyaa waamuun ejjennoo biyyattii kan Israa'elii fudhachuu diduu irratti ibsa gaafateera. Ministirri Dhimmi Alaa Maleezhiyaa akka ibsetti, biyyi isaanii ulaagaa immigireshiinii Israa'elota akka biyyaatti fudhachuu dhowwu qabdi. Kunis kan ta'e namoonni biyya tokkoo olitti lammii ta'an paaspoortii biyya biraatiin seenuun isaanii shakkamee qorannoon erga eegaleen booda dha.

title: Two wounded by US drone strike in Iran's Khorramabad
english: A US drone strike occurred early Friday morning in the Iranian city of Khorramabad. According to reports from the Fars news agency, the attack resulted in injuries to at least two individuals. The incident remains a developing situation.
amharic: አርብ ዕለት በኢራን ኮራማባድ ከተማ በተፈጸመ የአሜሪካ ድሮን ጥቃት ቢያንስ ሁለት ሰዎች መቁሰላቸው ተዘግቧል። የፋርስ የዜና ወኪል እንዳስታወቀው ጥቃቱ የተፈጸመው በማለዳ ሰዓታት ነው። ጉዳዩ አሁንም በክትትል ላይ ያለ ጉዳይ ነው።
oromo: Ganama Jimaata darbe magaalaa Khooramabaad kan Iran keessatti weerara xiyyaara nama hin feene (drone) kan Ameerikaan raawwatameen namoonni lama madaa'aniiru. Gabaasni ejansii oduu Faars akka ibsutti, miidhaan kun ganama barii kan ga'e yoo ta'u, haalli kun ammas qorannoo irratti argama.

title: Report: US army death toll abruptly lowered on Pentagon Website
english: The Pentagon recently reduced the official count of American soldiers killed from 18 to 14 on its website. Reports indicate this change may be linked to the Trump administration excluding four soldiers who died after an Iranian ceasefire was announced. Conversely, a Pentagon official attributed the adjustment to technical errors rather than a policy decision.
amharic: የፔንታጎን ድረ-ገጽ በአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ሞት ቁጥር ላይ ማሻሻያ በማድረግ ቁጥሩን ከ18 ወደ 14 ዝቅ አድርጓል። ዘገባዎች እንደሚጠቁሙት ይህ ለውጥ የተደረገው ከኢራን ጋር ከተደረሰ የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት በኋላ ህይወታቸው ያለፈ አራት ወታደሮችን ከዝርዝሩ ውስጥ ለማስወጣት በመፈለጉ ሊሆን ይችላል። ይሁን እንጂ የፔንታጎን ቃል አቀባይ ጉዳዩን በቴክኒክ ችግር ምክንያት እንደሆነ ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Ministeerri Raayyaa Ittisa Ameerikaa (Pentagon) lakkoofsa loltoota Ameerikaa du'aniin gabaasa isaa irratti jijjiirama gochuun 18 irraa gara 14tti gadi hir'iseera. Gabaasawwan akka agarsiisanitti, jijjiiramni kun kan taasifame loltoota afur waliigaltee dhaabbata waraanaa Iraan waliin taasifamee booda du'an haquuf akka ta'e dubbatama. Gama biraatiin, itti gaafatamaan Pentagon tokko jijjiiramni kun rakkoo tekinikaa kan uumame malee murtii siyaasaa miti jedhaniiru.

title: Adverse Opinions Pile Up as Addis Abeba’s Budget Hits a Record
english: A recent audit of the Addis Abeba City Administration revealed significant financial mismanagement, including billions of Birr in uncollected and unpaid funds across various government agencies. Despite the city collecting a record budget, inspectors found widespread issues like procurement violations, poor accounting practices, and a lack of proper documentation. Several major institutions, including the Addis Abeba Roads Authority, received poor performance ratings due to these systemic financial errors.
amharic: የአዲስ አበባ ከተማ አስተዳደር ባደረገው የኦዲት ምርመራ በተለያዩ መሥሪያ ቤቶች ውስጥ ከፍተኛ የሆነ የገንዘብ አስተዳደር ክፍተት መኖሩ ተጋለጠ። አስተዳደሩ ከፍተኛ በጀት ቢሰበስብም በቢሊዮን የሚቆጠሩ ብሮች ሳይሰበሰቡ ወይም ሳይከፈሉ ቀርተዋል። በተለይም በአዲስ አበባ መንገዶች ባለስልጣን እና በሌሎች ተቋማት ላይ የሂሳብ መዛባት፣ የግዥ ጥሰቶች እና የሰነድ አያያዝ ችግሮች መኖራቸው በሪፖርቱ ተመላክቷል።
oromo: Qorannoon gaggeeffame akka agarsiisutti, bulchiinsi magaalaa Finfinnee qabeenya isaa to'achuu fi sirnaan itti fayyadamuu irratti rakkoo guddaa qaba. Baajanni guddaan walitti qabamus, mallaqni biliyoonaan lakkaawamu walitti hin qabamne ykn bakka isaa hin geenye jira. Dhaabbileen akka Abbaa Taayitaa Daandiiwwan Finfinnee dabalatee, hanqina herregaa, seeraan alaa bituu fi sirna sanadaa qulqulluu dhabuu irraa kan ka'e qeeqamuun isaanii ibsameera.

title: A Sack of Cement, with the Chain No One Can See
english: The Ethiopian cement market is suffering from extreme price volatility and frequent shortages, making it difficult for legitimate retailers to operate. Middlemen have taken control of the supply chain after goods leave factories, often hoarding stock to artificially inflate prices. While factories struggle with raw material shortages, authorities are now investigating potential collusion between distributors and plant insiders to manipulate the market.
amharic: የኢትዮጵያ የሲሚንቶ ገበያ በከፍተኛ የዋጋ መዋዠቅ እና በተደጋጋሚ እጥረት እየተፈተነ በመሆኑ፣ ህጋዊ ነጋዴዎች ስራቸውን ለመቀጠል ተቸግረዋል። ሲሚንቶ ከፋብሪካ እንደወጣ በደላሎች ቁጥጥር ስር በመዋሉ፣ ምርቱን በመደበቅ ዋጋ እንዲንር እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ። ፋብሪካዎች በግብዓት እጥረት ሲቸገሩ፣ መንግስት ደግሞ በሲሚንቶ ስርጭት ላይ የሚፈጸመውን የዋጋ ማጭበርበር እና የደላሎች ህገ-ወጥ ድርጊት ለማጣራት ምርመራ ጀምሯል።
oromo: Gabaan simintoo Itoophiyaa gatii isaa kan deddeebi'uufi hanqina cimaan waan miidhameef, daldaltoonni seera qabeeyyiin hojii isaanii itti fufuu hin dandeenye. Simintoon warshaarraa baanaan harka giddu-galeyyii waan seenuuf, namoonni kunneen oomishicha kuusuudhaan gatiin akka olka'u godhuu jiru. Warshaaleen hanqina meeshaalee gargaaran osoo rakkachaa jiranii, mootummaan immoo harka-lafaa fi namoota daldala simintoo keessatti malaammaltummaa raawwataniirratti qorannoo eegaleera.

title: Airports Lack Master Plans, Title Deeds
english: A recent audit by the Office of the Auditor General revealed that 22 airports managed by Ethiopian Airlines Group are operating without proper master plans or land ownership documents. The report highlights serious safety concerns, including inadequate fencing that allows animals to enter airfields and the incomplete implementation of safety management systems. While airport management is working on corrective measures like procuring fencing materials, auditors expressed concern over the lack of formal planning and documented efforts to address these infrastructure gaps.
amharic: የጠቅላይ ኦዲተር መስሪያ ቤት ባደረገው የሥራ አፈጻጸም ኦዲት፣ በኢትዮጵያ አየር መንገድ ግሩፕ ሥር የሚተዳደሩ 22 አውሮፕላን ማረፊያዎች ተገቢ የሆነ ዋና ዕቅድ (Master Plan) ወይም የይዞታ ማረጋገጫ ሰነድ እንደሌላቸው ተጋልጧል። ሪፖርቱ አውሮፕላን ማረፊያዎች በእንስሳት መግባት እና የደህንነት ሥርዓቶች ሙሉ በሙሉ ተግባራዊ ባለመሆናቸው ለከባድ የደህንነት ስጋት የተጋለጡ መሆናቸውን ያመለክታል። የአየር መንገዱ አስተዳደር አጥር የማጠር እና የደህንነት ማኑዋሎችን የማዘጋጀት ሥራዎች እየተከናወኑ እንደሆነ ቢገልጽም፣ ኦዲተሮቹ በዕቅድ እና በደህንነት አጠባበቅ ላይ የታዩት ክፍተቶች አሳሳቢ እንደሆኑ ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Itti gaafatamaa qorannoo maallaqaa biyyattii (Auditor General) qorannoo godheen, buufataaleen xiyyaaraa 22 kanneen garee Itiyoophiyaa Aerlaayins jalatti bulfaman karoora gurguddoo fi ragaa qabiyyee lafaa akka hin qabne ibseera. Gabaasichi buufataalee kanneen keessatti lubbuu balaaf saaxiluu danda'u; keessattuu dallaan gahaa ta'e dhabamuu irraa kan ka'e bineensonni gara iddoo xiyyaaronni bu'anitti seenuun fi sirni eegumsa nageenyaa guutummaatti hojiirra ooluu dhabuun rakkoo akka ta'e eera. Bulchiinsi garee xiyyaaraa tarkaanfii sirreeffamaa fudhachaa jiraatus, qaamni qorannicha gaggeesse karoora dhabuu fi hanqina nageenyaa irratti xiyyeeffannoon kenname gahaa miti jechuun yaaddoo ibseera.

title: Parents Win, International Schools Lose Their Rulebook
english: A federal court has invalidated a Ministry of Education directive that allowed international schools to raise tuition fees by labeling them as fee harmonizations. The ruling follows a year-long legal challenge by parents from Sandford International School, who argued the policy was used to bypass regulations. By overturning this amendment, the court has effectively revoked the legal justification these schools used for their recent price hikes.
amharic: የፌደራል ከፍተኛ ፍርድ ቤት የትምህርት ሚኒስቴር የአለም አቀፍ ትምህርት ቤቶች የትምህርት ክፍያ ጭማሪን እንደ 'የክፍያ ማስተካከያ' እንዲያቀርቡ የሚፈቅደውን መመሪያ ውድቅ አድርጓል። ፍርድ ቤቱ ይህንን ውሳኔ የወሰነው የሳንድፎርድ አለም አቀፍ ትምህርት ቤት ወላጆች በአንድ አመት የህግ ክርክር ካሸነፉ በኋላ ነው። ይህ ውሳኔ ትምህርት ቤቶቹ ክፍያቸውን ለመጨመር ሲጠቀሙበት የነበረውን ህጋዊ መሰረት በማስቀረት፣ የክፍያ ጭማሪው ህጋዊነት ላይ ጥያቄ አስነስቷል።
oromo: Mana murtii federaalaa, Ministeerri Barnootaa manneen barnootaa idil-addunyaa gatii barnootaa akka dabalan kan hayyameef ajaja 'sirreeffama gatii' jedhu seeraan alaa fi aangoo isaa kan darbe ta'uu ibsuun haqee jira. Murtii kana kan argatan warra barattoota mana barnootaa Sandford International ti, isaanis waggaa tokkoof mana murtiitti falmaa turan. Murtichi manneen barnootaa kunneen gatii barnootaa dabaluuf bu'ura seeraa itti fayyadamaa turan waan haqeef, daballiin gatii amma jiru kun shakkiif saaxilameera.

title: Addis Abeba Plans to Move Its Money to the Wires
english: The Addis Ababa Finance Bureau is introducing a new directive to transition all municipal payments to a digital-only system to improve financial transparency and efficiency. While this move aims to reduce corruption and streamline government spending, experts caution that the city currently lacks the necessary technical infrastructure and risks vulnerability by relying on a single bank. Under the plan, all salaries, supplier payments, and allowances will be processed electronically, with strict controls to ensure accountability.
amharic: የአዲስ አበባ ከተማ ፋይናንስ ቢሮ የከተማ አስተዳደሩን የፋይናንስ አሰራር ግልጽና ቀልጣፋ ለማድረግ ሁሉንም ክፍያዎች በዲጂታል ስርዓት ብቻ እንዲፈጸሙ አዲስ መመሪያ አዘጋጅቷል። ይህ አሰራር ሙስናን ለመከላከል እና የመንግስት ወጪን ለመቆጣጠር ታቅዶ የተነደፈ ቢሆንም፣ ባለሙያዎች ግን ከተማዋ ለዚህ የሚሆን በቂ የመሠረተ ልማት አቅም እንዳልገነባችና በአንድ ባንክ ላይ ብቻ መመሥረቱ ስጋት እንደሚፈጥር ያስጠነቅቃሉ። በዚህ አዲስ እቅድ መሰረት፣ የደመወዝ ክፍያዎች፣ የአቅራቢዎች ክፍያ እና ሌሎች አበሎች በሙሉ በኤሌክትሮኒክስ መንገድ ብቻ እንዲከናወኑ ይደረጋል።
oromo: Biiroon Maallaqaa magaalaa Finfinnee hojiiwwan kaffaltii hundumaa sirna dijitaalaa fayyadamuun akka raawwatamuuf qajeelfama haaraa baaseera. Karoorri kun hojiiwwan maallaqaa iftoomina akka qabaatan fi saamicha maallaqaa hambisuuf kan karoorfame ta'us, ogeeyyoonni garuu magaalaan kun dandeettii teeknoolojii gahaa akka hin qabnee fi baankii tokko qofa irratti hirkachuun isaa rakkoo fiduu akka danda'u ibsaniiru. Karoora kanaan, kaffaltiin mindaa, kaffaltiin dhiyeessitootaa fi kaffaltiin biroo hundinuu karaa elektirooniksii qofa raawwatamuun to'annoo cimaa jalatti kan galu ta'a.

title: US imposes tariffs on dozens of trade partners over 'forced labour' imports
english: The United States is implementing new tariffs between 10% and 12.5% on 60 of its major trading partners, including China, the EU, and the UK. This decision comes as the Trump administration asserts that these countries have not done enough to prevent the import of goods produced by forced labor. These measures replace a previous temporary tax and reflect a broader strategy to prioritize human rights and fair trade standards in global commerce.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መንግስት ቻይናን፣ የአውሮፓ ህብረትን እና እንግሊዝን ጨምሮ በ60 የንግድ አጋሮቹ ላይ ከ10 እስከ 12.5 በመቶ የሚደርስ አዲስ ቀረጥ መጣሉን አስታውቋል። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው እነዚህ ሀገራት በግዳጅ የጉልበት ብዝበዛ የተመረቱ ምርቶችን ወደ አሜሪካ ከመላክ በመከላከል ረገድ በቂ ስራ አልሰሩም በሚል ክስ ነው። ይህ አዲስ ቀረጥ የቀድሞውን ጊዜያዊ የታክስ ስርዓት የሚተካ ሲሆን፣ ዋሽንግተን በዓለም አቀፍ ንግድ ላይ ሰብአዊ መብትን ለማስከበር የምትከተለው አዲስ ፖሊሲ አካል ነው።
oromo: Mootummaan Ameerikaa biyyoota gurguddoo 60 kanneen akka Chaayinaa, Gamtaa Awurooppaa fi UK irratti gibira haaraa 10% hanga 12.5% ta'u buuseera. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame biyyoonni kunneen hojii dirqisiisaan oomishaman gara Ameerikaa akka hin seenne ittisuu irratti ga'ee isaanii hin baane jedhamee waan amanamuufi. Gibirri kun sirna gibira kanaan dura ture kan bakka bu'u yoo ta'u, Ameerikaan daldala idil-addunyaa keessatti mirga namoomaa fi haqa daldalaa kabachiisuuf karoorfattee kan hojjettu ta'uu agarsiisa.

title: Indonesian babies were trafficked to Singapore. What happens to them now?
english: An Indonesian court has convicted 19 individuals involved in a trafficking ring that sold at least 34 babies, with several infants sent to Singapore for adoption. Adoptive parents in Singapore are now facing uncertainty, as they worry whether they will be allowed to keep the children they raised. Both Indonesian and Singaporean authorities are currently evaluating the legal status of these children and have yet to decide if they will be returned to their home country.
amharic: የኢንዶኔዢያ ፍርድ ቤት ቢያንስ 34 ሕፃናትን ለሕገ-ወጥ ጉዲፈቻ ሲሸጡ የነበሩ 19 ግለሰቦችን ጥፋተኛ ብሎ ወስኗል። እነዚህ ሕፃናት በሕገ-ወጥ መንገድ ወደ ሲንጋፖር የተላኩ ሲሆን፣ በአሁኑ ወቅት በዚያ የሚገኙ አሳዳጊ ወላጆች ልጆቻቸውን የማጣት ስጋት ውስጥ ወድቀዋል። የሁለቱ አገራት መንግስታት የሕፃናቱን ሕጋዊ ሁኔታ እየመረመሩ ሲሆን፣ ልጆቹ ወደ ቤተሰቦቻቸው ይመለሱ ወይም በሲንጋፖር ይቆዩ የሚለው ውሳኔ እስካሁን አልተወሰነም።
oromo: Mana murtii Indoneziyaatti garee daa'imman 34 ol gurguruu fi seeraan alaa guduunfaa guduunfatan 19 irratti murtee dabarseera. Daa'imman kunneen gara Siingappooritti ergaman yoo ta'u, warri achitti guddifatanis ijoollee isaanii dhabuu danda'u jedhanii yaaddoo keessa jiru. Mootummoonni biyyoota lamaanii haala seeraa ijoollee kanaa qorachaa jiran malee, ijoolleen kunneen gara biyyaatti deebi'u moo achuma turu jedhamuun ammaaf murteeffamuu hin dandeenye.

title: As oil soars, experts watch Red Sea tankers for clarity on Houthi blockade
english: Global oil prices have climbed above $100 per barrel following a new naval blockade by Houthi rebels in the Red Sea. The group is specifically targeting Saudi, Israeli, and U.S.-linked vessels, recently attacking two Saudi tankers near the Bab el-Mandeb strait. Analysts are monitoring which ships the Houthis permit to pass, noting that tankers with Chinese affiliations appear to be moving through the area without interference.
amharic: በቀይ ባህር በሁቲ አማጽያን አዲስ የባህር ላይ እገዳ መጣሉን ተከትሎ የአለም የነዳጅ ዋጋ ከአንድ መቶ ዶላር በላይ አሻቅቧል። ቡድኑ በተለይም ከሳውዲ አረቢያ፣ እስራኤል እና አሜሪካ ጋር ግንኙነት ያላቸውን መርከቦች በማነጣጠር በባብ አል-ማንደብ ባህር መተላለፊያ አካባቢ ጥቃት አድርሷል። ባለሙያዎች በበኩላቸው የሁቲ አማጽያን የትኞቹን መርከቦች እንደሚያሳልፉ እየተከታተሉ ሲሆን፣ ከቻይና ጋር ግንኙነት ያላቸው መርከቦች ግን ያለምንም እንቅፋት ሲንቀሳቀሱ መታዘባቸውን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Houthiwwan galaana diimaa keessatti daangaa gabaa boba'aa waan cufaniif gatiin boba'aa addunyaa dolaara 100 ol dabreera. Gareen kun dooniiwwan Saudii, Israa'elii fi Ameerikaa waliin walqabatan irratti xiyyeeffatee bakka 'Bab el-Mandeb' jedhamutti haleellaa raawwateera. Hayyoonni akkamatti boba'aan gara fuulduraatti akka deemuu danda'u hordofaa jiru; haa ta'u malee, dooniiwwan Chaayinaa waliin walqabatinsa qaban garuu rakkoo tokko malee qaxxaamuraa akka jiran hubatameera.

title: What are the Abraham Accords?
english: The Abraham Accords are a series of diplomatic agreements aimed at normalizing relations between Israel and several Arab nations. Recently, these accords have gained renewed attention as they are being linked to potential US-Saudi Arabian security and nuclear negotiations. Donald Trump has suggested that Saudi Arabia's formal participation in these agreements is a necessary requirement for future cooperation.
amharic: የአብርሃም ስምምነቶች በእስራኤል እና በበርካታ የአረብ አገራት መካከል ያለውን ግንኙነት መደበኛ ለማድረግ የተፈረሙ ተከታታይ የዲፕሎማሲ ስምምነቶች ናቸው። በቅርቡ እነዚህ ስምምነቶች ከሳዑዲ አረቢያ ጋር ሊደረጉ ከሚችሉ የኒውክሌር እና የደህንነት ድርድሮች ጋር በተያያዘ እንደገና ትኩረት አግኝተዋል። ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ሳዑዲ አረቢያ በእነዚህ ስምምነቶች ውስጥ መካተቷ ለወደፊት ትብብር ወሳኝ ቅድመ ሁኔታ መሆን እንዳለበት ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Walii galteen Abraaham kun biyyoota Arabaa fi Israa'el gidduutti hariiroo dippilomaasii diriirsuuf kan taasifame dha. Walii galteewwan kun yeroo ammaa mootummaan Amerikaa fi Sa'udii Arabiyaa walii galtee niwukilaraa fi nageenyaa irratti mari'achaa jiran waliin wal qabatee xiyyeeffannoo argatee jira. Donald Tiraamp, Sa'udiin Arabiyaan walii galtee kana keessatti hirmaachuun ishee tumsa fuulduraa kan itti fufuuf dirqama ta'uu isaa dubbataniiru.

title: US launches 13th night of strikes as Iran warns of escalation in the Gulf
english: The United States has conducted military strikes for the 13th night in a row amid rising regional tensions. Iranian officials have responded with stern warnings, suggesting that continued aggression could trigger retaliation against nations in the Gulf region. This ongoing cycle of military action has heightened fears of a broader conflict spreading across the Middle East.
amharic: አሜሪካ በተከታታይ ለ13ኛው ሌሊት ወታደራዊ ጥቃቶችን አድርሳለች። የኢራን ባለስልጣናት ይህ ድርጊት በባህረ ሰላጤው አካባቢ ባሉ አገራት ላይ አጸፋዊ ምላሽ ሊያስከትል እንደሚችል አስጠንቅቀዋል። ይህ ቀጣይነት ያለው ወታደራዊ እንቅስቃሴ በምስራቅ አፍሪካና በመካከለኛው ምስራቅ አካባቢዎች ሊባባስ የሚችል ግጭት ስጋትን ጨምሯል።
oromo: Amerikaa halkanii fi guyyaa guyyaa 13ffaadhaaf haleellaa waraanaa geggeessaa jirti. Aangewoonni Iraan, haleellaan kun yoo itti fufe biyyoota naannoo Goolfii irratti tarkaanfiin haaloo bahuu akka fudhatamu akeekkachiisaniiru. Walitti buiinsi waraanaa kun naannicha keessatti jeequmsi akka babal'atu sodaa guddaa uumeera.

title: ‘There’s no salary’: DRC health workers tell of hardship as Ebola spreads
english: A severe Ebola outbreak is spreading rapidly across the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo, exacerbated by a lack of vaccines for the rare strain and delayed detection. Health workers on the front lines are facing significant dangers, including physical attacks from suspicious communities and a severe lack of personal protective equipment. Furthermore, many medical staff have stopped working because they have not been paid their salaries, creating a critical crisis in the healthcare response.
amharic: በኮንጎ ዲሞክራቲክ ሪፐብሊክ ምስራቃዊ ክፍል የኢቦላ ወረርሽኝ በከፍተኛ ፍጥነት እየተስፋፋ ይገኛል፣ ይህም በክትባት እጥረት እና በበሽታው ዘግይቶ መገኘት ምክንያት ይበልጥ አሳሳቢ ሆኗል። በግንባር ቀደምትነት የሚሰሩ የጤና ባለሙያዎች ከህብረተሰቡ የሚደርስባቸውን ጥቃት እና የመከላከያ ቁሳቁስ እጥረትን ጨምሮ በርካታ ፈተናዎች ተጋርጠውባቸዋል። ከዚህም በላይ ደመወዝ ባለመከፈሉ ምክንያት ብዙ የጤና ባለሙያዎች ስራቸውን ለማቆም በመገደዳቸው የበሽታውን ስርጭት ለመግታት የሚያስችል ጥረት ከፍተኛ አደጋ ውስጥ ወድቋል።
oromo: Vaayrasii Ebola naannoo baha biyya Koongoo keessatti saffisaan babal'achaa jiru kun, hanqina talaallii fi dhibichaa dafanii gadi baasuu dadhabuu irraa kan ka'e rakkoo guddaa ta'eera. Ogeeyyonni fayyaa hojii irra jiran miidhaa qaamaa hawaasa biraa isaan irra ga'uufi hanqina meeshaalee ittisaa dabalatee rakkoo cimaaf saaxilamaniiru. Kana malees, mindaan isaanii kaffalamuu dhabuun ogeeyyonni hedduun hojii dhaabuu isaaniitiin, tattaaffiin dhibicha to'achuuf godhamaa jiru balaa hamaa keessa seeneera.

title: US court affirms release of pro-Palestine scholar as legal battle continues
english: A U.S. appeals court has ruled that Georgetown University scholar Badar Khan Suri can remain free while fighting his deportation. The court supported his argument that his arrest for pro-Palestinian activism violated his constitutional rights to free speech and due process. This decision marks a significant legal victory, though the case may eventually reach the Supreme Court.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የይግባኝ ሰሚ ፍርድ ቤት የጆርጅታውን ዩኒቨርሲቲ ምሁር የሆኑት ባዳር ካን ሱሪ ከአገር የመባረር ሂደት እስኪጠናቀቅ ድረስ በነጻነት እንዲቆዩ ወስኗል። ፍርድ ቤቱ ለፍልስጤም ድጋፍ በማድረጋቸው የታሰሩት ምሁሩ፣ መታሰራቸው የሕገ መንግሥት የመናገር ነፃነታቸውን የሚጻረር መሆኑን አረጋግጧል። ይህ ውሳኔ ለምሁሩ ትልቅ የሕግ ድል ቢሆንም፣ ጉዳዩ ወደ ጠቅላይ ፍርድ ቤት ሊያመራ እንደሚችል ተጠቁሟል።
oromo: Mana murtii ol’aanaa Ameerikaa tokko qorataa Yuunivarsiitii Joorjiitawn kan ta’an Badar Kaan Suurii, ergaa deggersa Falasxiin dabarsuu isaaniitiin erga hidhamanii booda gadi lakkifamuun isaanii sirrii ta’uu mirkaneesseera. Manni marichaa, hidhaan isaanii mirga yaada ibsachuu fi seeraa kan cabse ta’uu isaa fudhateera. Murtii kanaan namichi kun akka gadhiifamu murtaa’us, dhimmi kun gara fuulduraatti gara Mana Murtii Ol’aanaa sadarkaa biyyaatti darbuu danda’a.

title: US attack on Iran's Ahvaz kills four
english: A missile strike attributed to the United States occurred near the city of Ahvaz in Iran's Khuzestan province. The attack resulted in the deaths of four people and left five others injured. Authorities are currently addressing the aftermath of this incident in the region.
amharic: በኢራን ኩዜስታን ግዛት አህቫዝ ከተማ አቅራቢያ በተፈጸመ የአሜሪካ ሚሳኤል ጥቃት አራት ሰዎች ተገድለዋል። በዚሁ ጥቃት አምስት ሰዎች ደግሞ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። ጉዳዩን አስመልክቶ ተጨማሪ መረጃዎች እየተጠበቁ ነው።
oromo: Godina Khuzestan kan Iran, magaalaa Ahvaz cinaatti xiyyaaraan haleellaa Ameerikaan gaggeeffameen namoonni afur du’aniiru. Haleellaa kanaan namoonni shan ammoo miidhamaniiru. Ta’ichi naannichatti muddama uumee jira.

title: Loud blasts and sirens reported in Jordan
english: Residents in Amman, the capital of Jordan, have reported hearing loud explosions and air raid sirens. While these incidents have been mentioned in various reports, their accuracy has not yet been confirmed by news outlets. Authorities have not provided an official explanation regarding the nature of these disturbances.
amharic: በዮርዳኖስ ዋና ከተማ አማን ከፍተኛ ፍንዳታዎች እንደተሰሙ እና የአየር ጥቃት ማስጠንቀቂያ ሳይረኖች እንደጮሁ ተዘግቧል። እነዚህ መረጃዎች በብዙ የዜና ምንጮች የተጠቀሱ ቢሆንም፣ በገለልተኛ አካላት እስካሁን የተረጋገጡ አይደሉም። የሀገሪቱ ባለስልጣናት ስለሁኔታው እስካሁን ምንም አይነት ይፋዊ መግለጫ አልሰጡም።
oromo: Magaalaa guddittii Yordaanoos Ammaan keessatti sagaleen dhukaatii cimaa fi sireeniin akeekkachiisa weerara qilleensa irraa akka dhaga'ame gabaafameera. Gabaasni kun miidiyaalee adda addaa irratti kan ba'e ta'us, hanga ammaatti dhugummaan isaa mirkanaa'uu hin dandeenye. Abbootiin taayitaa biyyattii waa'ee taatee kanaa irratti ibsa gahaa ta'e hanga ammaatti hin kennine.

title: Air raid sirens and blasts heard in Kuwait
english: Authorities in Kuwait have activated air raid sirens following multiple reports of explosions across the country. The situation remains developing as officials assess the nature and origin of the blasts. Residents have been alerted to potential security threats in the region.
amharic: በኩዌት በተለያዩ አካባቢዎች የፍንዳታ ድምፆች መሰማታቸውን ተከትሎ የአየር ጥቃት ማስጠንቀቂያ ደወሎች ተደውለዋል። ባለስልጣናት ስለ ፍንዳታው ምንነት እና መንስኤ ምርመራ እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ። የሀገሪቱ ነዋሪዎችም ሊከሰት የሚችለውን የጸጥታ ስጋት በተመለከተ ጥንቃቄ እንዲያደርጉ ተመክረዋል።
oromo: Kuweyt keessatti sagaleen dhohiinsa garaagaraa dhaga'amuun hordofee, sireenii akeekkachiisa weerara qilleensa irraa akka hojjetu taasifameera. Abbootiin taayitaa dhohiinsi kun maal irraa akka dhufe qorachaa jiru. Jiraattonni naannichaa balaa nageenyaa mudachuu danda'u irratti of eeggannoo akka taasisan gorfamaniiru.

title: US military says 13th consecutive night of attacks on Iran completed
english: The United States military has carried out strikes against Iranian targets for the 13th night in a row. These two-hour operations focused on destroying key military infrastructure, including drone storage sites, communication systems, and naval surveillance equipment. This ongoing campaign marks a sustained effort by the U.S. Central Command to disrupt Iranian military capabilities.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል ኢራንን ኢላማ ያደረገ ጥቃት ለተከታታይ አስራ ሶስተኛው ምሽት መፈጸሙን አስታውቋል። ከሁለት ሰዓታት በላይ በዘለቀው በዚህ ዘመቻ የኢራን ወታደራዊ የመገናኛ ዘዴዎች፣ የድሮን ማከማቻዎች እና የባህር ጠረፍ መቆጣጠሪያ ጣቢያዎች ላይ ጉዳት ደርሷል። ይህ የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ እርምጃ የኢራንን ወታደራዊ አቅም ለማዳከም ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Waraanni Ameerikaa halkanii fi guyyaa kudha sadiif walitti aansee bakkeewwan Iran irratti haleellaa raawwachuu isaa ibseera. Haleellaa sa'atii lama ol fudhate kanaan, bakkeewwan meeshaalee waraanaa, kuusaan daayrootaa, fi tajaajilli quunnamtii fi to'annoo galaanaa Iran irratti miidhaan ga'eera. Tarkaanfiin kun ajajni waraana Ameerikaa dandeettii waraana Iran laaffisuuf kan fudhateedha.

title: Eight Muslim countries denounce mass Israeli raid on Al-Aqsa
english: Eight Muslim nations have collectively condemned recent Israeli settler incursions at the Al-Aqsa Mosque compound, labeling them as illegal and extremist. These countries argued that such actions violate international law and threaten the status quo of sacred sites in East Jerusalem. The ministers warned that these provocative behaviors undermine peace efforts and reaffirmed their support for Jordan’s role as the historic custodian of the holy site.
amharic: ስምንት የእስልምና እምነት ተከታይ አገራት በኢየሩሳሌም አል-አቅሳ መስጊድ ላይ የተፈጸመውን የእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎች ወረራ በጋራ አውግዘዋል። አገራቱ እነዚህ ድርጊቶች ዓለም አቀፍ ህግን የሚጥሱ እና የተቀደሱ ቦታዎችን ነባራዊ ሁኔታ የሚፈታተኑ መሆናቸውን ገልጸዋል። ይህ አካሄድ የሰላም ጥረቶችን የሚያደናቅፍ መሆኑን የገለጹት ሚኒስትሮቹ፣ ለዮርዳኖስ የአል-አቅሳ ቅዱስ ስፍራ ጠባቂነት ያላቸውን ድጋፍ ዳግም አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Biyyoonni Musliimaa saddeet haleellaa gama Israa’eelootaatiin masjiida Al-Aqsa irratti raawwatame balaaleffataniiru. Biyyoonni kun gochi kun seera idil-addunyaa kan cabsu fi haala naannawaa qulqulluu sanaa kan booresu ta'uu ibsaniiru. Gochi kun carraaqqii nagaa gufachiisaa akka jiru kan hubachiisan ta'uun, itti gaafatamummaa masjiidicha eeguu kan Yordaanos ta'uu deggaruun beeksisaniiru.

title: Trump expands voluntary pledge to blunt AI-driven utility bill surges
english: President Trump has expanded a voluntary agreement aimed at preventing AI companies from passing their massive energy costs onto regular utility customers. By involving more states and utility providers, the administration hopes to ensure these tech firms pay for the infrastructure they require rather than everyday households. While the White House describes this as a historic move, critics note that the pledge is not legally enforceable despite projections that AI data centers could significantly raise future electricity bills.
amharic: ፕሬዚዳንት ትራምፕ የሰው ሰራሽ አስተውሎት (AI) ኩባንያዎች የሚያስፈልጋቸውን ከፍተኛ የኃይል ወጪ በጋራ ተጠቃሚዎች ላይ እንዳይጭኑ ለመከላከል ያለመ የበጎ ፈቃድ ስምምነት አስፍተዋል። መንግስት ተጨማሪ የክልል አስተዳደሮችን እና የኤሌክትሪክ አቅራቢዎችን በማካተት፣ እነዚህ የቴክኖሎጂ ኩባንያዎች ለሚጠቀሙት መሠረተ ልማት ራሳቸው እንዲከፍሉ ለማድረግ ይጥራል። ነጭ ቤተመንግስት ስምምነቱን ታሪካዊ ቢለውም፣ በዘርፉ ያለው የኃይል ፍላጎት የኤሌክትሪክ ክፍያን በእጅጉ እንደሚጨምር ስጋት ስላለ፣ ስምምነቱ ህጋዊ አስገዳጅነት የሌለው መሆኑ ትችት እየቀረበበት ነው።
oromo: Pireezidaanti Traamp dhaabbileen 'Artificial Intelligence' (AI) baasii anniisaa guddaa isaan barbaachisu madda galii uummataa irraa akka hin kaffalsiisne dhorkuuf walii galtee fedhii irratti hundaa'e tokko bal'isaniiru. Mootummaan naannolee fi dhaabbilee anniisaa dabalataa walii galtee kana keessatti hirmaachisuun, dhaabbileen teeknoolojii kunneen bu'uuraalee misoomaa ofii isaanii akka kaffalan taasisuuf yaala. Mana Maree Aadaa (White House) tarkaanfichi seena qabeessa jedhee ibsus, fedhiin anniisaa AI gatii ibsaa mana jireenyaa olkaasuu danda'a waan ta'eef, walii galtichi dirqisiisaa seeraa hin qabaanne jedhamee komatamaa jira.

title: Two Palestinians killed as Israel intensifies strikes on Gaza City
english: Israeli military forces launched new airstrikes against Gaza City, resulting in the deaths of two Palestinians and leaving multiple others wounded. The attacks targeted refugee camps where many displaced people were seeking shelter. This incident marks a significant escalation in the ongoing regional conflict.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች በጋዛ ከተማ ባደረሱት አዲስ የአየር ጥቃት ሁለት ፍልስጤማውያን ሲገደሉ በርካቶች ደግሞ ቆስለዋል። ጥቃቱ የተፈጸመው ተፈናቃዮች ተጠልለው በሚገኙባቸው የስደተኞች ካምፖች ላይ ነው። ይህ ድርጊት በክልሉ እየተካሄደ ያለውን ግጭት አባብሶታል።
oromo: Humnooni waraana Israa'el magaalaa Gaazaatti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwataniin namoonni Falasxiin lama ajjeefamanii kan biroon immoo madaa'aniiru. Haleellaan kun kan qajeele buufataalee godaantotaa bakka namoonni bakkeetti buqqa'an keessa jiraatanitti. Gochi kun walitti bu'iinsa naannichaa daran kan hammaachiise dha.

title: How the Houthi Red Sea blockade will impact the world
english: The Houthi group has initiated a blockade at the Bab al-Mandeb strait, which is a critical passage for international maritime trade. This disruption in the Red Sea is expected to cause significant global economic strain. Consequently, consumers worldwide may face rising costs for goods as shipping routes are challenged.
amharic: የሁቲ ታጣቂዎች በዓለም አቀፍ የንግድ መስመር ወሳኝ በሆነው በባብ አል-ማንደብ ባህረ ሰላጤ ላይ ማገጃ ጥለዋል። ይህ በኤርትራ ባህር ላይ የተፈጠረው ችግር በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የኢኮኖሚ ጫና ሊፈጥር ይችላል። በዚህም ሳቢያ፣ የመርከብ ጉዞዎች በመስተጓጎላቸው የሸቀጣሸቀጥ ዋጋ በዓለም ዙሪያ ሊጨምር እንደሚችል ይጠበቃል።
oromo: Humni Huthotaa karaa daldala idil-addunyaa irratti bakka murteessaa ta'e kan ta'e Bab al-Mandeb irratti danqaa uumaniiru. Rakkoon galaana diimaa keessatti uumame kun dinagdee addunyaa irratti dhiibbaa cimaa geessisuu danda'a. Bu'aa kanaatiin, geejjibni meeshaalee waan gufatuuf, gatiin meeshaalee addunyaa maratti dabaluun isaa hin oolu.

title: Arab and Muslim countries condemn Israeli storming of Al-Aqsa Mosque
english: Eight Arab and Muslim-majority nations have issued a joint condemnation following a massive incursion into the Al-Aqsa Mosque compound by thousands of Israeli settlers and far-right figures. The participating countries warned that these actions, which occurred under police protection, threaten regional peace efforts and attempt to illegally alter the status of Jerusalem’s holy sites. Palestinian officials reported that authorities restricted access for worshippers and used force during the event, which coincided with the Jewish holiday of Tisha B’Av.
amharic: ስምንት የአረብ እና የእስልምና እምነት ተከታይ አገራት በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ እስራኤላውያን ሰፋሪዎች በአል-አቅሳ መስጊድ ቅጥር ግቢ ውስጥ በፈጸሙት ወረራ ላይ የጋራ ተቃውሞ አሰምተዋል። አገራቱ በፖሊስ ጥበቃ የታጀበው ይህ ድርጊት የሰላም ጥረቶችን የሚያደናቅፍ እና የኢየሩሳሌምን ቅዱስ ስፍራዎች ታሪካዊ ሁኔታ ለመቀየር የሚደረግ ህገ-ወጥ ሙከራ እንደሆነ ገልጸዋል። የፍልስጤም ባለስልጣናት በበኩላቸው፣ የጸጥታ ሃይሎች አማኞችን ከመስጊዱ እንዳይገቡ በመከልከል እና በመደብደብ የሃይማኖት ነጻነትን እንደጣሱ አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Biyyoonni Arabaa fi Musliimotaa saddeet, sagantaa amantii Yihuudii Tisha B'Av ilaalchisee guyyaa tokko keessatti sagantaa guddaa isaanii kanaan qooda fudhachuun namoonni kuma afur ol ta'an gara masgiida Al-Aqsa seenuusaanii jabinaan balaaleffatan. Biyyoonni kunneen gochi kun eegumsa poolisiin raawwatame nagaa naannichaa kan booressuu fi daangaa bakka kanaa jijjiiruuf yaaliidha jedhaniiru. Mootummaan Falasxiin akka ibsetti, waraanni Israa'el namoota amantii isaanii raawwachuuf dhufan qabuufii daandii cufuun akkasumas reebicha raawwachuun isaanii uummata irratti miidhaa guddaa geessiseera.

title: Is this Italy’s ‘George Floyd moment’?
english: The death of Abderrahim Fakir, a Moroccan-born man, following a police intervention in Bologna has triggered public protests in Italy. This incident has raised significant concerns regarding police conduct and the need for greater accountability within the Italian justice system. Many are comparing this case to the death of George Floyd, highlighting growing tensions over racial justice and law enforcement practices.
amharic: በጣሊያን ቦሎኛ ከተማ በፖሊስ ቁጥጥር ስር የነበረው አብደራሂም ፋኪር የተባለ ሞሮኳዊ መሞቱ ተከትሎ በሀገሪቱ ተቃውሞዎች ተቀስቅሰዋል። ይህ ክስተት በጣሊያን ፖሊስ አያያዝ ላይ ጥያቄዎችን በማንሳት ለተጠያቂነት መረጋገጥ ጥሪዎችን አጠናክሯል። ብዙዎች ይህንን አሳዛኝ ክስተት በዩናይትድ ስቴትስ የጆርጅ ፍሎይድን ሞት ካስከተለው ጋር በማነፃፀር፣ በዘረኝነት እና በፖሊስ አሰራር ላይ ውይይት እንዲደረግ ግፊት እያደረጉ ነው።
oromo: Namichi lammii Morookoo kan ta'e Abderrahim Fakir magaalaa Bologna keessatti harka poolisoota jala utuu jiruu du'uun isaa mormii guddaa Xaaliyaanii keessatti kaaseera. Mudannoon kun hojii poolisootaa fi ittigaafatamummaa irratti shakkiin akka uumamu godheera. Namoonni baay'een du'a isaa kana du'a George Floyd waliin wal bira qabuun, sirna poolisii fi qulqullina mirga namoomaa irratti gaaffilee garaagaraa kaasaa jiru.

title: US war on Iran: The $110 billion price tag
english: The United States has spent nearly $110 billion on its military conflict with Iran. Despite claims that the mission has been successful, the Trump administration is now requesting an additional $67 billion in funding. This significant expenditure highlights the ongoing and rising financial burden associated with the country's involvement in the region.
amharic: አሜሪካ ከኢራን ጋር ላደረገችው ወታደራዊ ግጭት እስከ አሁን ድረስ ወደ 110 ቢሊዮን ዶላር የሚጠጋ ወጪ አውጥታለች። ድሉን ያወጁ ቢሆንም፣ የትራምፕ አስተዳደር አሁን ተጨማሪ 67 ቢሊዮን ዶላር በጀት ጠይቀዋል። ይህ ከፍተኛ ወጪ አሜሪካ በክልሉ ያላትን ተሳትፎ ተከትሎ የሚመጣውን የገንዘብ ጫና ያሳያል።
oromo: Ameerikaan walitti bu'iinsa waranaa Iran waliin taasifti keessatti hanga ammaatti tilmaamaan dolaara biliyoona 110 baasii gooteetti. Injifannoo labsatanii kan jiran ta'us, bulchiinsi Trump amma dabalata dolaara biliyoona 67 akka barbaadu beeksiseera. Baasiin guddaan kun immoo Ameerikaan naannichatti hirmaachuun ishee baasii maallaqaa hangam guddaa akka gaafatu agarsiisa.

title: Trump warns of largest strikes on Iran yet as Tehran lashes out across Gulf
english: President Donald Trump has threatened to carry out the most significant military strikes on Iran to date following a series of Iranian attacks on U.S. allies in the Gulf. This escalation comes after continuous military exchanges between the two nations, which have effectively nullified recent peace efforts. Iran has retaliated against targets in Jordan, Kuwait, and Bahrain, vowing to persist as long as the United States continues its own aggressive actions against Iranian infrastructure.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ኢራን በአሜሪካ የባህረ ሰላጤ አጋሮች ላይ ጥቃት ማድረሷን ተከትሎ፣ እስካሁን ከነበሩት ሁሉ የከፋ ወታደራዊ ጥቃት በኢራን ላይ እንደሚፈጽሙ አስጠነቀቁ። ይህ የሁለቱ ሀገራት ግጭት ቀደም ሲል የተደረሰውን ጊዜያዊ የሰላም ስምምነት አፍርሶታል። ኢራንም በአፀፋው በዮርዳኖስ፣ በኩዌት እና በባህሬን ላይ ጥቃት የሰነዘረች ሲሆን፣ አሜሪካ በኢራን መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ የምታደርሰውን ጥቃት እስካላቆመች ድረስ አፀፋዊ እርምጃዋ እንደሚቀጥል አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Pireezidaanti Doonald Traamp, Iraan michoota Ameerikaa kanneen naannoo Goolfiitti argaman irratti haleellaa raawwachuushee hordofee, hanga ammaatti haleellaa guddaa ta'e akka raawwatu akeekkachiiseera. Walitti buutiin kun kanaan dura waligaltee nagaa yeroodhaaf godhame ture kan diige yoo ta'u, gama lamaaniin haleellaan itti fufeera. Iraanis deebii weeraraa Yordaanos, Kuweeytii fi Baahireen keessatti raawwattee jirti; akkasumas Ameerikaan bu'uuraalee misoomaa Iraan irratti haleellaa gochuu hanga dhaabdeetti, isheenis deebii kennuu akka itti fuftu beeksisteetti.

title: US-Saudi nuclear deal hinges on normalisation with Israel
english: President Trump has clarified that any potential agreement for the United States to assist Saudi Arabia with civilian nuclear energy is strictly conditional. For the deal to move forward, Saudi Arabia must officially normalize its diplomatic relationship with Israel through the Abraham Accords. Discussions between the two nations regarding this arrangement are currently still in progress.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ እንደገለጹት አሜሪካ ለሳዑዲ አረቢያ በሲቪል የኒውክሌር ኃይል ዙሪያ የምታደርገው ድጋፍ ከእስራኤል ጋር ባላቸው ግንኙነት ላይ የተመሰረተ ነው። ስምምነቱ ተግባራዊ እንዲሆን ሳዑዲ አረቢያ ከአብርሃም ስምምነት ጋር በመቀላቀል ከእስራኤል ጋር ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት መመስረት ይጠበቅባታል። ሁለቱ ሀገራት በዚህ ጉዳይ ላይ ያላቸው ድርድር አሁንም ቀጥሏል።
oromo: Pirezedaanti Traamp akka ibsanitti, Ameerikaan sa'udii Arabiyaaf gargaarsa teeknooloojii niwukilaaraa siiviilii gochuun ishee walii galtee isaan Israa'el wajjin qaban irratti kan hundaa'e dha. Walii galtee kana hojiirra oolchuuf, Sa'udiin Arabaa 'Abraham Accords' jedhamuutti makamuudhaan Israa'el wajjin hariiroo dippilomaasii diriirsuun ishee dirqama ta'a. Mareen biyyoota lamaan gidduutti godhamaa jiru ammallee itti fufee jira.

title: India activist ends hunger strike after 26 days
english: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk has concluded his 26-day hunger strike, which he undertook to support youth protesters calling for educational reforms and the resignation of the country's education minister. He decided to stop his fast following negotiations and government assurances that authorities would not take legal action against the demonstrators. Although Wangchuk has ended his protest, the youth movement continues its campaign at the Jantar Mantar site until their political demands are met.
amharic: የህንድ አክቲቪስት ሶናም ዋንግቹክ የትምህርት ማሻሻያዎችን እና የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩን ስልጣን መልቀቅ በሚጠይቁ የወጣቶች ተቃውሞ ድጋፍ ሲያደርጉት የነበረውን የ26 ቀን የረሃብ አድማ አቁመዋል። አክቲቪስቱ በባለስልጣናት መካከል በተደረገ ድርድር እና በተቃዋሚዎች ላይ ህጋዊ እርምጃ እንደማይወሰድ ዋስትና ካገኙ በኋላ ነው አድማውን ያቆሙት። ምንም እንኳን ዋንግቹክ አድማውን ቢጨርሱም፣ የወጣቶች ንቅናቄው እስካሁን ያቀረቡት የፖለቲካ ጥያቄ እስኪሟላ ድረስ በጃንታር ማንታር አካባቢ ተቃውሟቸውን እንደሚቀጥሉ አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Duula beelaa guyyaa 26f gaggeessaa turan booda, qabsaa'aan biyya Indiyaa Sonam Waangchuuk duula isaanii dhaabaniiru. Qabsaa'ichi kan beelaa dhaaban kun, barattoota jijjiirama barnootaa gaafachaa jiran fi ministira barnootaa biyyattii aangoo gadi akka lakkisan gaafachaa turan deggeruuf ture. Mootummaan mootummaa irraa dhiibbaa fi tarkaanfiin seeraa qabsaa'ota irratti akka hin fudhatamne waadaa galuu isaa hordofee, mariiwwan godhaman booda duula isaanii dhaabaniiru. Giddu galeessi kun kan dhaabate ta'us, gareen dargaggootaa gaaffiin isaanii hanga deebii argatutti bakka Jantar Mantaritti hiriira isaanii itti fufanii jiru.

title: Rally attendee steals the show by mimicking Trump’s gestures
english: During a campaign event in Marietta, Georgia, a supporter sitting behind Donald Trump captured widespread attention. The attendee spent the duration of the speech humorously imitating the former president's characteristic facial expressions and hand movements. This viral moment became a notable highlight from the rally.
amharic: በጆርጂያ ማሪዬታ በተካሄደ የቅስቀሳ መድረክ ላይ ከዶናልድ ትራምፕ ጀርባ የተቀመጠ አንድ ደጋፊ በሰፊው መነጋገሪያ ሆኗል። ግለሰቡ የቀድሞው ፕሬዝዳንት ንግግር በሚያደርጉበት ወቅት የእጅ ምልክቶቻቸውን እና የፊት አገላለጻቸውን በመኮረጅ ትኩረት ስቧል። ይህ ድርጊት በስብሰባው ላይ በብዙዎች ዘንድ አስገራሚ ክስተት ሆኖ ታይቷል።
oromo: Magaalaa Maariyaataa, Joorjiyaa keessatti walgahii duula filannoo Donald Traamp irratti, namni tokko Traamp duubaan taa'ee xiyyeeffannoo guddaa hawwateera. Namichi kun yeroo Traamp haasawaa gochaa turanitti, sochii harkaafi ilaalcha fuula isaanii walitti aansuun fakkeessuun beekamtii argateera. Gochi kun walgahicharratti namoota hedduu biratti dhugaatti kan nama ajaa'ibu ta'ee ture.

title: France wildfires force evacuation of over 20,000 people from tourist town
english: Severe wildfires in southwest France have forced over 20,000 residents and tourists to evacuate as flames spread rapidly through pine forests near Bordeaux. Hundreds of firefighters, soldiers, and emergency aircraft are working to contain the blaze, which is believed to have been accidentally ignited by machinery. These fires are part of a broader trend of extreme weather and heatwaves across Europe, placing significant strain on firefighting resources and the environment.
amharic: በደቡብ ምዕራብ ፈረንሳይ የተቀሰቀሰው ከፍተኛ የእሳት አደጋ ከ20,000 በላይ ነዋሪዎችን እና ቱሪስቶችን ከአካባቢው ለቆ እንዲወጣ አስገድዷል። በቦርዶ አቅራቢያ የሚገኙ የጥድ ደኖችን እያወደመ ያለው ይህ እሳት፣ በአጋጣሚ በማሽን በተፈጠረ ብልጭታ እንደተቀሰቀሰ ይገመታል። በፈረንሳይ እና በአውሮፓ አህጉር እየታዩ ያሉ ተከታታይ የሙቀት ማዕበሎች እና ድርቅ የእሳት አደጋው እንዲባባስ ምክንያት ሆነዋል።
oromo: Fayoon bosonaa cimaan kibba-lixaa Faransaayitti mudate jiraattotaa fi turisoota 20,000 ol ta'an naannichaa akka baqatan dirqisiiseera. Ibiddi kun naannoo Bordootti bosona mukkeen fayyisoo gubaa jiru, kan ka'es qonnaan ykn hojiin mishiinaa osoo geggeeffamuu akka ta'e shakkameera. Rakkoon jijjiirama qilleensaa fi hoo'i lafaa garmalee dabaluun isaa, Awurooppaa keessatti balaan ibiddaa kun akka bal'atuufi to'achuun akka itti ulfaatu taasiseera.

title: Videos show the moment police officer shoots man on street in Wisconsin
english: A police officer in Wisconsin fatally shot a man, an incident captured on video that has sparked significant public anger. In response to the tragedy, demonstrators gathered at the site of the shooting to call for transparency and accountability from law enforcement. The footage has led to intense scrutiny regarding the circumstances surrounding the officer's use of lethal force.
amharic: በዊስኮንሲን ግዛት በአንድ ፖሊስ መኮንን የተገደለውን ሰው የሚያሳይ ቪዲዮ በህዝብ ዘንድ ከፍተኛ ቁጣን ቀስቅሷል። የተፈጠረውን ግድያ ተከትሎ ብዙ ሰዎች በአካባቢው በመሰብሰብ ለፖሊስ ግልጽነት እንዲኖር እና ተጠያቂነት እንዲሰፍን ጠይቀዋል። ክስተቱ የፖሊስ የኃይል አጠቃቀም አግባብነት ላይ ትልቅ ውይይት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Godina Wiskoonsinitti poolisiin tokko namicha tokko ajjeesuu isaa kan agarsiisu viidiyoon tokko lammilee biratti dheekkamsa guddaa kaaseera. Miidiyaan kun erga gadhiifamee booda, namoonni hedduun bakka sanatti walitti qabamuun poolisiin gocha kanaaf gadi fageenyaan akka gaafatamuufi dhugaan akka ba'u gaafataniiru. Gochi kun humni poolisii itti fayyadame sirrii ta'uu fi dhiisuu isaa irratti mormii cimaa uumeera.

title: White House says will not block Tate brothers’ extradition to UK
english: The White House has confirmed it will not intervene in the extradition of Andrew and Tristan Tate to the United Kingdom. The brothers face numerous serious charges in Britain, including rape, sexual assault, and human trafficking, stemming from alleged incidents between 2010 and 2017. Despite the Tates' public support for President Trump, administration officials stated there is no legal reason to block the extradition process.
amharic: የነጭ ቤተ መንግስት አንድሪው እና ትሪስታን ታይት ወደ ዩናይትድ ኪንግደም እንዲዛወሩ የተወሰነውን ውሳኔ እንደማያግድ አስታውቋል። ወንድማማቾቹ በብሪታንያ በፈጸሙት ተብሎ በሚጠረጠረው አስገድዶ መድፈር፣ ወሲባዊ ጥቃት እና የሰዎች ዝውውር ወንጀሎች እንዲጠየቁ ይጠበቃል። ምንም እንኳን ታይቶች ለፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ድጋፍ ቢሰጡም፣ የዩናይትድ ስቴትስ መንግስት በህጋዊው የክስ ሂደት ውስጥ ጣልቃ እንደማይገባ ገልጿል።
oromo: Mana Maree Adii (White House) obboloota Andrew fi Tristan Tate gara biyya Ingilizii erguu akka hin dhoorkine ibseera. Obboloonni kun bara 2010 hanga 2017 gidduutti raawwatame jedhamee kan shakkamu yakka gudeeddii, miidhaa saalaa fi daldala namootaa irratti himatamaniiru. Obboloonni kun pirezidaantii Traampii deggerus, mootummaan Yunaayitid Isteetis adeemsa seeraa kana keessa akka hin galle beeksisaniiru.

title: Deadly monsoon floods kill at least 40 in India
english: Severe monsoon flooding in northeast India's Assam state has resulted in at least 40 deaths and left approximately 80 individuals missing. Over 650,000 people have been impacted by the rising waters across 11 districts. Emergency response teams are currently working to rescue and evacuate those stranded by the disaster.
amharic: በህንድ የአሳም ግዛት በደረሰው ከባድ የמוንሱን ዝናብ እና ጎርፍ ቢያንስ 40 ሰዎች ህይወታቸው አልፏል፤ ከ80 በላይ የሚሆኑት ደግሞ የደረሱበት አልታወቀም። በ11 ወረዳዎች ውስጥ ከ650,000 በላይ ሰዎች ለጉዳት የተጋለጡ ሲሆን፣ የነፍስ አድን ሰራተኞች ተጎጂዎችን ለማውጣት እየሰሩ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Giddugala baha Indiyaa, naannoo Assamitti roobni cimaan roobee lolaa hamaan mudateen namoonni yoo xiqqaate 40 du'aniiru, namoonni 80 ta'an immoo eessa bu'aan isaanii hin beekamu. Aanaalee 11 keessatti namoonni 650,000 ol ta'an miidhamaniiru, gareen gargaarsa namoomaas namoota lolaa kanaan qabaman oolchuuf socho'aa jiru.

title: Indian activist Wangchuk ends 26-day hunger strike over exam paper leaks
english: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk has concluded his 26-day hunger strike, which he started to protest against recurring exam paper leaks. He had been calling for the resignation of the country's Education Minister due to these widespread failures. The protest ended after Prime Minister Narendra Modi promised to implement stricter legislation to prevent future academic fraud.
amharic: የሕንድ አክቲቪስት ሶናም ዋንግቹክ ለተደጋጋሚ የፈተና ወረቀት መፍሰስ ተቃውሞ ሲያደርጉት የቆዩትን የ26 ቀናት የረሃብ አድማ አቁመዋል። አክቲቪስቱ የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩ ስልጣናቸውን እንዲለቁ ሲጠይቁ ቆይተዋል። የረሃብ አድማው የተጠናቀቀው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ናሬንድራ ሞዲ ለወደፊቱ የፈተና ማጭበርበርን ለመከላከል ጠንካራ ህግ እንደሚያወጡ ቃል ከገቡ በኋላ ነው።
oromo: Duula beekamaa Hindii Sonam Waangchuuk, xalayaa qormaataa kutaaleen biyyattii keessatti deddeebi'ee akka bahuuf sababa ta'e mormuudhaan guyyaa 26f gaggeessaa turan xumuran. Inni Ministirri Barnootaa biyyattii hojiirraa akka gaggeeffaman gaafachaa ture. Mormiin kun kan dhaabbate erga Ministirri Muummee Naarendraa Moodii, fuulduratti maallaqa qormaataa eeguuf seera cimaa baasuuf waadaa galanii boodadha.

title: Minnesota man who killed Democratic lawmaker sentenced to life in US prison
english: A Minnesota man named Vance Boelter has been sentenced to two life terms plus 40 years for the 2025 assassination of Democratic state lawmaker Melissa Hortman and her husband. The attacker, who posed as a police officer to target political figures, also seriously injured State Senator John Hoffman and his wife. This severe sentence reflects the judge's condemnation of the premeditated political violence that deeply impacted the victims and their families.
amharic: የሚኒሶታው ነዋሪ ቫንስ ቦልተር እ.ኤ.አ. በ2025 የዴሞክራቲክ ፓርቲ የሕግ አውጪዋን ሜሊሳ ሆርትማንን እና ባለቤታቸውን በመግደሉ የዕድሜ ልክ እስራት እና ተጨማሪ 40 ዓመታት ተፈርዶበታል። አጥቂው የፖሊስ መኮንን መስሎ በመቅረብ ጥቃቱን የፈጸመ ሲሆን፣ በሴናተር ጆን ሆፍማን እና ባለቤታቸው ላይም ከባድ ጉዳት አድርሷል። ዳኛው ይህ ድርጊት በታቀደ የፖለቲካ ጥቃት ላይ የተፈጸመ መሆኑን በመጥቀስ፣ የተሰጠው ቅጣት ተገቢ መሆኑን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Namni Minisoota irraa ta'e Vance Boelter jedhamu, bara 2025 keessa aanga'aa paartii Dimookraatik Melissa Hoortmaan fi abbaa manaa ishee ajjeesuu isaatiin hidhaa umrii guutuu fi waggaa 40 itti murameera. Namni kun poolisii of fakkeessee qaama siyaasaa irratti miidhaa kan geessise yoo ta'u, seenaatar John Hoffmaan fi haadha manaa isaaniis akka gaariitti miidheera. Murtii cimaan kun yakka siyaasaa karooraan raawwatame irratti kan xiyyeeffatu ta'uu fi miidhaan inni namoota irratti geessise ulfaataa ta'uu abbaan murtichaa ibseera.

title: Journalist killed in Mexico after years of exposing corruption
english: Mexican journalist Alejandro Leyva Aguilar was fatally shot while dining at a food stall in Oaxaca. He was well-known for his dedicated work investigating government corruption and criminal activities. This tragic incident marks the fourth time a member of the press has been killed in the country since June.
amharic: ሜክሲካዊው ጋዜጠኛ አሌሃንድሮ ሌይቫ አጉዊላር በኦአካካ ከተማ በሚገኝ የምግብ መሸጫ ቦታ ላይ ተኩስ ተከፍቶበት ተገደለ። ጋዜጠኛው ለበርካታ ዓመታት በመንግስት ሙስና እና በወንጀል ድርጊቶች ላይ ምርመራ በማድረግ ይታወቅ ነበር። ይህ አሳዛኝ ክስተት ከሰኔ ወር ወዲህ በሜክሲኮ የተገደለ አራተኛው ጋዜጠኛ ያደርገዋል።
oromo: Gaazexeessaan Meksikoo Alehaandro Leyva Aguilaar magaala Oaakaakaatti yeroo nyaata nyaachaa turetti rasaasaan dhukaafamee ajjeefame. Inni hojii isaa keessatti malaammaltummaa mootummaa fi yakka gaggeeffamu gabaasaa fi saaxilaa kan ture dha. Ajjeechaan kun akkuma ji'a Waxabajjii irraa jalqabee namoota miidiyaa irratti raawwatamee ture, kan afraffaa ta'uun isaa ibsameera.

title: Resumption of oil exports: Will Yemen recover its economic lifeline?
english: Yemen's government has announced the resumption of oil exports, a crucial source of foreign revenue that had been suspended since 2022 due to the ongoing conflict. While officials hope this will stabilize the economy and fund public services, the success of this move depends on securing vital infrastructure and regaining the trust of international buyers. Persistent instability and the threat of escalating violence remain major challenges to maintaining a reliable flow of oil to global markets.
amharic: የየመን መንግሥት ከ2022 ጀምሮ ተቋርጦ የነበረውን የነዳጅ ንግድ እንደገና እንደሚጀምር አስታውቋል። ይህ እርምጃ የውጭ ምንዛሪ በማስገኘት ኢኮኖሚውን ለማረጋጋት እና የመንግሥት ሰራተኞችን ደመወዝ ለመክፈል ትልቅ ፋይዳ ይኖረዋል ተብሎ ይታመናል። ሆኖም የነዳጅ ማውጫ መስመሮችን እና ወደቦችን ደህንነት መጠበቅ እንዲሁም የአለም አቀፍ ገዢዎችን አመኔታ መመለስ ለስኬታማነቱ ወሳኝ ነው። አገሪቱ ውስጥ ያለው የጸጥታ መደፍረስና የጦርነት ስጋት ግን የዚህን የነዳጅ ዘይት ንግድ ቀጣይነት አስቸጋሪ ሊያደርገው ይችላል።
oromo: Mootummaan Yemen erga bara 2022 irraa kaasee dhaabbatee ture, gurgurtaa boba'aa biyyattii irraa deebisee jalqabuuf murteesseera. Murtoon kun diinagdee biyyattii tasgabbeessuuf fi tajaajila uummataa deeggaruuf murteessaa dha. Haa ta'u malee, hojiin kun bu'a qabeessa ta'uuf bakkeewwan boba'aa fi buufataalee nageenyasaanii eeggachuu akkasumas fedhii gurgurtaa idil-addunyaa deebisanii argachuu gaafata. Waraanni fi tasgabbii dhabuun biyyattii keessatti mul'atu garuu yaalii kana milkeessuuf gufuu guddaa ta'uu mala.

title: Can India’s youth-led protest movement bring lasting change?
english: A youth-led protest movement in India, sparked by a major exam paper leak, has evolved into a nationwide campaign addressing unemployment and government accountability. Demonstrators are specifically demanding the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan, rejecting the government's initial attempts to resolve the crisis. This movement presents a significant political challenge to Prime Minister Narendra Modi's administration during his third term.
amharic: በሕንድ ውስጥ በፈተና ወረቀት መፍሰስ ምክንያት የተቀሰቀሰው የወጣቶች የተቃውሞ እንቅስቃሴ፣ በአሁኑ ወቅት ስለ ሥራ አጥነት እና የመንግሥት ተጠያቂነት ወደሚያጠነጥን አገራዊ ንቅናቄ ተሸጋግሯል። ተቃዋሚዎቹ የመንግሥትን የመፍትሄ ሃሳቦች በመቃወም የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩ የሥልጣን መልቀቂያ እንዲሰጡ እየጠየቁ ይገኛሉ። ይህ እንቅስቃሴ በጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ናሬንድራ ሞዲ ሦስተኛ ዘመን አስተዳደር ላይ ትልቅ የፖለቲካ ፈተና ደቅኗል።
oromo: Hiriirri mormii dargaggoota Hindii, kan qormaata biyyoolessaa irratti gaaffileen hatamuu isaa hordofee jalqabe, amma gara sochii biyyoolessaatti guddatee jira. Dargaggoonni kunniin rakkoolee hojii dhabdummaa fi gaaffii gaafatama mootummaa kaasuun, ministirri barnootaa aangoo gadhiisuu qaba jedhanii gaafachaa jiru. Sochiin kun yeroo ammaatti mootummaa muummicha ministiraa Narendra Modiif mormii siyaasaa cimaa ta'ee jira.

title: Opinion: The founders of the ICC must not let it be destroyed
english: On this year's International Justice Day, the International Criminal Court faced a somber atmosphere rather than a celebration. The institution is under significant pressure due to aggressive opposition from the United States during the Trump administration. Observers are concerned that member nations have failed to effectively defend the court against these ongoing challenges.
amharic: የዓለም አቀፍ የፍትህ ቀንን ምክንያት በማድረግ የተከበረው በዓል የዓለም አቀፉ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት ባጋጠመው ፈተና ምክንያት በደስታ ሳይሆን በስጋት ታጅቦ አለፈ። ፍርድ ቤቱ በአሜሪካ የቀድሞ ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ አስተዳደር ዘመን ከፍተኛ ጫና እና ጥቃት ደርሶበታል። አባል ሀገራት ፍርድ ቤቱን ከዚህ ጫና ለመከላከል በቂ አቅም ወይም ፍላጎት ማጣታቸው ስጋት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Guyyaan Haqaa Addunyaa kan bara kanaa yeroo kabajamu, Mana Murtii Yakka Addunyaa irratti dhiibbaa cimaan jiraachuun isaa gammachuu irra yaaddoon akka guutamu godheera. Mana murtichatti dhiibbaan cimaan kan uumame yeroo bulchiinsa duraanii Donald Trump keessa yoo ta'u, biyyoonni miseensa ta'an mana murtichaaf ittisa gahaa gochuu dadhabuun isaanii yaaddoo uumeera.

title: Kuwaiti army says it is protecting the ‘homeland’s borders’
english: The Kuwaiti military has announced that it is implementing strict security measures following multiple drone attacks on its border with Iraq. While the strikes caused some physical damage to property, no injuries were reported. Officials confirmed that their forces remain vigilant and committed to safeguarding national security.
amharic: የኩዌት ጦር ከኢራቅ ጋር በሚዋሰነው ድንበር ላይ በተደጋጋሚ በድሮን ጥቃት እንደደረሰበት በማስታወቅ አስፈላጊውን የጥበቃ እርምጃ እየወሰደ መሆኑን ገልጿል። ጥቃቱ በንብረት ላይ ጉዳት ያደረሰ ቢሆንም የሰው ህይወት አልጠፋም። የሀገሪቱን ድንበር እና ደህንነት ለመጠበቅ ጦሩ በከፍተኛ ዝግጁነት ላይ እንደሚገኝ የመከላከያ ሚኒስቴር አስታውቋል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Kuweyt daangaa Isaa kan Iraaq waliin qaburratti haleellaan xiyyaara malee (drone) irra deddeebi’ee raawwatamuu hordofee tarkaanfiin eegumsaa cimaan fudhatamaa jiraachuu beeksise. Haleellaan kun qabeenyarratti miidhaa qaqqabsiise malee lubbuun namootaa hin darbe. Mootummaan biyyattii daangaa fi nageenya biyyattii eeguuf humnoonni isaa qophii guutuu keessa akka jiran mirkaneesseera.

title: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
english: Mykhailo Fedorov, the recently dismissed Ukrainian defense minister, has declined alternative government roles and is demanding his former position back. Despite President Zelensky offering him other roles, protesters are continuing to demonstrate in his support, arguing that his modern approach and strategic initiatives are vital for the war effort. Fedorov maintains that his leadership team has a clear, effective plan to reach peace, and he believes he should remain in his post to see these goals through.
amharic: የዩክሬኑ የተባረሩት የመከላከያ ሚኒስትር ሚካሂሎ ፌዶሮቭ፣ መንግስት የሰጣቸውን አማራጭ የስራ መደቦች ባለመቀበል የድሮውን ቦታቸው እንዲመለስ እየጠየቁ ነው። ምንም እንኳን ፕሬዝዳንት ዘለንስኪ ሌሎች ስራዎችን ቢሰጡአቸውም፣ ደጋፊዎቻቸው ባደረጉት ተቃውሞ እና በሚኒስትሩ የለውጥ ስራዎች ምክንያት መመለሳቸውን በመጠየቅ ላይ ናቸው። ሚኒስትሩ ጦርነቱን ለማሸነፍ የሚያስችል ግልጽ እቅድ እንዳላቸው እና ስራቸውን መቀጠል እንደሚያስፈልግ ይገልጻሉ።
oromo: Ministirri ittisa biyya Yukreen kan yeroodhaf hojiirraa ari'aman Mihayilo Fedorov, hojii mootummaan biraa kenneef fudhachuu diduun bakka isaanii duraanii akka deebi'an gaafachaa jiru. Prezidaant Zelenski hojiiwwan biroo yoo dhiyeessaniifis, ummanni fi degartoonni isaanii jijjiirama inni fude fi tarsiimoo inni qabu akka malee waan barbadaniif akka deebi'u hiriira bahaniru. Fedorov gama isaaniitiin, waraana kana injifachuuf karoora ifa ta'e akka qaban ibsuun, galma ga'uuf hojii isaanii itti fufuu akka qaban amanu.

title: Bordeaux wildfire burns 3,100 hectares, 20,000 evacuated
english: A large forest fire near Bordeaux, France, has destroyed over 3,100 hectares of land. Authorities have evacuated 20,000 people from the area to ensure their safety. Currently, hundreds of firefighters are battling the blaze as unpredictable winds make it difficult to protect nearby homes.
amharic: በፈረንሳይ ቦርዶ ከተማ አቅራቢያ በተነሳ ሰፊ የደን ቃጠሎ ከ3,100 ሄክታር በላይ መሬት ወድሟል። የደረሰውን አደጋ ተከትሎ ከ20,000 በላይ የሚሆኑ ነዋሪዎች እና ቱሪስቶች ከቀያቸው እንዲለቁ ተደርገዋል። የአየር ሁኔታው እና የነፋሱ አቅጣጫ መለዋወጥ ስራውን አስቸጋሪ ቢያደርገውም፣ በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩ የእሳት አደጋ ሰራተኞች እሳቱን ለመቆጣጠር ጥረት እያደረጉ ነው።
oromo: Fransiitti, magaalaa Bordeaux biratti ibidda bosonaa guddinaan hamma hektaara 3,100 ta'u barbadeesse ka'eera. Balaa kanaan walqabatee, namoonni 20,000 ol ta'an iddoo jireenya isaanii irraa buqqa'aniiru. Qilleensichi dafnee jijjiiramuun isaa hojii dhaamsuu rakkisaa ta'us, waldhaansoon ibiddaa kun akka hin babal'anne fi manneen jireenyaa akka hin tuqneef ogeeyyoonni dhaamsaa ibiddaa hedduun tattaaffii cimaa gochaa jiru.

title: UK’s Burnham tells Scotland new independence vote is off limits
english: British Prime Minister Andy Burnham has officially rejected the possibility of a new Scottish independence referendum. During a meeting with Scotland's First Minister John Swinney, Burnham stated that his administration is prioritizing economic growth and cost-of-living improvements over constitutional debates. Instead of a new vote, the Prime Minister plans to focus on granting more local autonomy and decision-making power to regions across the UK.
amharic: የብሪታኒያው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አንዲ በርንሃም ስኮትላንድ አዲስ የነጻነት ህዝበ ውሳኔ እንድታካሂድ የሚያስችላትን ጥያቄ ውድቅ አድርገዋል። ከስኮትላንድ የመጀመሪያ ሚኒስትር ጆን ስዊኒ ጋር በተወያዩበት ወቅት፣ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትሩ መንግስታቸው የኢኮኖሚ እድገትን እና የኑሮ ውድነትን መቀነስ እንደ ዋና ቅድሚያ የሚሰጠው ጉዳይ አድርጎ እንደሚሰራ ገልጸዋል። ከህገ-መንግስታዊ ለውጦች ይልቅ፣ በዩናይትድ ኪንግደም ለሚገኙ የተለያዩ አካባቢዎች ተጨማሪ የራስ ገዝ አስተዳደር ስልጣን በመስጠት ችግሮችን ለመፍታት አቅደዋል።
oromo: Muummee Ministiraa Biritaaniyaa kan ta'an Andy Burnham, biyyi Skotlaand yaada sagalee kennuu irra deebi'ee bilisummaa argachuuf taasisu akka hin qabaanne dhorkaniiru. Ministira Mummee Skotlaand John Swinney waliin wal arguun isaanii, Mootummaan isaanii xiyyeeffannaa guddaa kan kennu guddina diinagdee fi hir'ina baasii jireenyaatiif malee gaaffiiwwan heera biyyaa irratti miti jedhaniiru. Yaada sagalee kennuu haaraa irratti xiyyeeffachuu mannaa, mootummaan isaanii aanaalee UK keessa jiran hundaaf aangoo ofiin bulinsaa fi murtee kennuu dabaluuf hojjechaa jira.

title: What are the security implications of the US-Saudi nuclear deal?
english: President Trump has finalized a 30-year agreement to provide Saudi Arabia with nuclear technology, which the U.S. claims is strictly for civilian energy use. Despite these assurances, critics fear the deal could allow Riyadh to enrich its own uranium, potentially triggering a dangerous nuclear arms race in the Middle East. High-profile figures, including former Israeli officials, have strongly opposed the move, warning that it may inevitably lead to the development of nuclear weapons in the region.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ሳውዲ አረቢያ የኒውክሌር ቴክኖሎጂን ለሰላማዊ የኃይል አገልግሎት እንድታገኝ የሚያስችል የ30 ዓመት ስምምነት ተፈራርመዋል። ይሁን እንጂ ስምምነቱ ሳውዲ አረቢያ ዩራኒየምን ለማበልፀግ እድል ስለሚሰጣት በመካከለኛው ምስራቅ የኒውክሌር የጦር መሳሪያ ውድድርን ሊቀሰቅስ ይችላል የሚል ስጋት ተፈጥሯል። የእስራኤል ባለስልጣናትን ጨምሮ በርካታ ተቺዎች ይህ አካሄድ በመጨረሻ ሳውዲ አረቢያ የኒውክሌር መሳሪያ እንድትታጠቅ መንገድ ይከፍታል ሲሉ በስምምነቱ ላይ ከፍተኛ ተቃውሞ እያሰሙ ነው።
oromo: Pireezidaant Tiraamp Sa'udii Arabiyaaf teeknoolojii niukileeraa kan fayidaa nageenyaaf oolu dabarsuuf waggaa 30f kan turu waliigaltee mallatteessaniiru. Ta'us, waliigalteen kun Sa'udi Arabiyaan yuraaniyamii ofiin akka qopheessituu fi kunis naannoo baha giddu galeessaatti dorgommii meeshaa niukileeraa akka uumu sodaachiseera. Namoonni bebbeekamoo fi aanga'oonni Israa'el dabalatee, tarkaanfiin kun gara fuulduraatti Sa'udi Arabiyaan meeshaa niukileeraa akka horattuuf karaa saaqachuu danda'a jechuun mormiisaanii ibsaniiru.

title: IMO chief condemns attacks on shipping in the Red Sea area
english: The head of the International Maritime Organisation has strongly criticized recent Houthi attacks on Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea. One of the targeted ships caught fire following the assault, raising serious safety concerns for maritime traffic. The organization is also worried that such violence could lead to significant environmental damage from oil leaks in the region.
amharic: የዓለም አቀፉ የባህር ትራንስፖርት ድርጅት ኃላፊ በኤርትራ ባህር ውስጥ በሳውዲ አረቢያ የነዳጅ መርከቦች ላይ የተፈጸመውን የሁቲዎች ጥቃት በጽኑ አውግዘዋል። በጥቃቱ ምክንያት አንደኛው መርከብ በእሳት የተያዘ ሲሆን ይህም በባህር ላይ ለሚደረጉ የንግድ እንቅስቃሴዎች ከፍተኛ ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ድርጅቱ ጥቃቱ በባህር አካባቢ ሊያደርስ ስለሚችለው የነዳጅ መፍሰስና የአካባቢ ብክለት ከፍተኛ ስጋት እንዳለው ገልጿል።
oromo: Hogganaan dhaabbata geejjiba galaanaa idil-addunyaa haleellaa gareen Huutii dooniiwwan boba'aa kan Sa'udii Arabaa irratti baha diimaa keessatti raawwatan cimsanii balaaleffataniiru. Haleellaa kanaan dooniiwwan keessaa tokko ibiddaan kan rukutame yoo ta'u, kunis nageenya geejjiba galaanaa irratti sodaa guddaa uumeera. Dhaabbatichi haleellaan kun boba'aan dhangala'ee naannichatti miidhaa qilleensaafi qulqullina bishaan irratti geessisuu danda'a jedhee yaadda'eera.

title: US Senate blocks resolution curbing Trump's Iran war powers
english: The U.S. Senate has rejected a resolution that sought to restrict President Trump's authority to initiate military action against Iran. Although some members of the President's own party expressed concerns about the potential conflict, the measure failed to pass with a 49 to 47 vote. This outcome means Congress will not currently limit the President's war powers regarding Iran.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ሴኔት ፕሬዚዳንት ትራምፕ በኢራን ላይ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ ለመውሰድ ያላቸውን ስልጣን የሚገድብ ረቂቅ ውሳኔ ውድቅ አድርጓል። ከፕሬዚዳንቱ የራሳቸው ፓርቲ የተወሰኑ አባላት ጭምር የጦርነት ስጋት ቢኖራቸውም፣ ረቂቁ በ49 ድጋፍ እና በ47 ተቃውሞ አልጸደቀም። በመሆኑም ኮንግረሱ በኢራን ጉዳይ ላይ የፕሬዚዳንቱን የጦርነት ስልጣን ለመገደብ ያቀረበው ሙከራ ሳይሳካ ቀርቷል።
oromo: Senaatni Ameerikaa murtee pirezidaant Traamp irratti aangoo waraanaa Iran irratti tarkaanfii fudhachuu daangeessuuf dhiyaate diduu isaa beekameera. Miseensota paartii pirezidaantichaa keessaa illee yaaddoo waraanaa kan qaban ta’us, murteen kun sagalee 49 fi 47n kufuu danda’eera. Kanaafuu, Kongireessi aangoo waraanaa pirezidaantichaa Iran irratti qaban daangeessuuf yaaliin godhame hin milkoofne.

title: Saudi and UAE showcase public display of unity after months of strained relations
english: Saudi Arabia and the UAE have publicly reaffirmed their strong alliance through synchronized social media statements, aiming to silence rumors of a rift between the two nations. This move follows a period of significant disagreement over regional security strategies, oil production policies, and their conflicting interests in the Yemen conflict. Both countries are now stressing their shared history and unified vision to move past recent public disputes and media-led hostility.
amharic: ሳውዲ አረቢያ እና የተባበሩት አረብ ኤሚሬቶች በመካከላቸው የነበረውን የፖለቲካ መቃቃር ለማስወገድ በጋራ ባወጡት የሶሻል ሚዲያ መግለጫ አጋርነታቸውን አረጋግጠዋል። ሁለቱ አገራት በነዳጅ ምርት፣ በየመን ግጭት እና በክልሉ የፀጥታ ጉዳዮች ላይ በነበራቸው ልዩነት ምክንያት ባለፉት ወራት ውጥረት ውስጥ ነበሩ። አሁን ግን አገራቱ የጋራ ታሪካቸውን እና ለወደፊት ያላቸውን የተቀናጀ ራዕይ በማጉላት በግልጽ መለያየታቸውን ለመካድ እየሰሩ ነው።
oromo: Saudii Arabiyaa fi Emireetiin Arabaa walitti bu'iinsa ji'oota hedduuf isaan gidduutti ture erga booda, wal ta'iinsa isaanii ibsuuf miidiyaalee hawaasummaa irratti ibsa wal fakkaatu baasaniiru. Biyyoonni lamaan kun dhimmoota oomisha boba'aa, waraana Yemenii fi nageenya naannoo irratti walii galtee dhabuun isaanii duraan beekamaa ture. Amma garuu, biyyoonni kunneen seenaa waliinii fi galma tokko qabaachuu isaanii ibsuun, wal dhabdee fi oduu sobaa isaanii gidduu jiru dhaabsisuuf yaalii gochaa jiru.

title: UK says armed forces ready to defend country after Iran warning over US bombers
english: The British government has stated that its military is fully prepared to defend the nation following threats from Iran regarding the use of UK bases by American bombers. Officials emphasized that they maintain a constant state of readiness to protect the country from both domestic and international threats. This defensive strategy involves a coordinated effort across all branches of the armed forces, supported by NATO partners.
